---
title: "Latin text classification"
author: "Muhammad Rehan"
date: 2026-01-10
format:
  html:
    theme:
      light: [lux, assets/theme.scss]
      dark: [darkly, assets/theme-dark.scss]
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    anchor-sections: true
    code-copy: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
    code-link: true
    highlight-style: nord
    lightbox: auto
    citations-hover: true
    crossrefs-hover: true
    fig-align: center
    fig-width: 8
    fig-asp: 0.62
    fig-dpi: 300
    fig-format: svg
    grid:
      body-width: 980px
      margin-width: 280px
      gutter-width: 1.2rem
    css: [assets/custom.css]

include-in-header:
  text: |
    <!-- Standard meta -->
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    <meta name="theme-color" content="#0b5ed7" />

    <!-- KaTeX for LaTeX math -->
    <link rel="stylesheet"
          href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.8/dist/katex.min.css"
          integrity="sha384-/7mQh8gJtX+NEwGDbVS9/6IKxhpcJn/qdNqxabWWMwBLT/gR59OA8sLu7saEh1N5"
          crossorigin="anonymous">

    <script defer
            src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.8/dist/katex.min.js"
            integrity="sha384-G/jPD7WvyaManIeZDV4SSQdlqzTeWY5Avzkdxl3pNGdisz8Iky3Uczdlz7YTpcvA"
            crossorigin="anonymous"></script>

    <script defer
            src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.16.8/dist/contrib/auto-render.min.js"
            integrity="sha384-mll67QQj1YOD9OFwP8CMLJrjCwXTlzAIXazhbugzuDUFcPRl1BDpRP70dNFu7Bbf"
            crossorigin="anonymous"
            onload="renderMathInElement(document.body);"></script>

execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: auto
  cache: true
  dpi: 600

math: katex
---

# Classification of christian vs. non-christian documents


## Data loading and cleaning

### Loading in and filtering the data (this code chunk can be skipped if corpus.csv already exists in the script directory)

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(stringi)

data_path <- "../../data/processed_texts/600ad"
results_path <- "../../results/predictions/non_transformer_lemmatized/600ad"
```


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(quanteda)
library(quanteda.textmodels)

df <- readr::read_csv(file.path(data_path, "corpus_600ad.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(id = as.character(id)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(text) & text != "") %>%
  mutate(row_id = row_number())

labels <- readr::read_csv(file.path(data_path,"corpus_600ad_labeled.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(id = as.character(id)) %>%
  filter(label %in% c("christian", "non_christian")) %>%
  transmute(id, manual_label = label) %>%
  distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE)

df_labeled <- df %>%
  inner_join(labels, by = "id") 

```


### Loading in the stopwowrds

```{r}

custom_additions <- c(
  "m", "c", "l", "d", "gt", "lt", "br", "href", 
  "fridericus", "heinricus", "conradus", "meus", "tuus" 
)

stops_v1 <- scan("../../data/stopwords/stopwords_latin1.txt", what = "character", quiet = TRUE, encoding = "UTF-8")

stops_v2 <- scan("../../data/stopwords/stopwords_latin2.txt", what = "character", comment.char = "#", quiet = TRUE, encoding = "UTF-8")

latin_stops <- c(stops_v1, stops_v2, custom_additions)

latin_stops <- latin_stops[latin_stops != "*"]

latin_stops <- unique(latin_stops)

latin_stops <- sort(latin_stops)

head(latin_stops, 200)

```



### Defining a tokenization function to count relative frequencies per token for the NB classifier


```{r}
library(quanteda)
library(quanteda.textmodels)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)


get_standard_dfm <- function(text_data, stop_list) {

  toks <- tokens(text_data, remove_punct = TRUE, remove_numbers = TRUE) %>%
    tokens_remove(pattern = stop_list)
  

  dfm(toks)
}


dfm_train <- get_standard_dfm(df_labeled$text, latin_stops)

dim(dfm_train)

```


## Training classification models

### Setting up model parameters

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(quanteda)
library(quanteda.textmodels)
library(glmnet)
library(LiblineaR)
library(xgboost)
library(lightgbm)
library(Matrix)
library(pROC)
library(stringi)

set.seed(123)

checkpoint_path <- "../../results/predictions/non_transformer_lemmatized/600ad"
output_dir <- file.path(checkpoint_path, "model_outputs_loao_author_cv")
hyperparam_search_root <- "../../results/predictions/non_transformer_lemmatized/600ad"

dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

write_csv_atomic <- function(x, path) {
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  tmp <- paste0(path, ".tmp_", Sys.getpid(), "_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d%H%M%S"), ".csv")
  readr::write_csv(x, tmp)
  ok <- file.rename(tmp, path)
  if (!ok) {
    file.copy(tmp, path, overwrite = TRUE)
    unlink(tmp)
  }
  invisible(path)
}

log_progress <- function(step, detail = "") {
  message(paste0("[", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "] ", step, if (nzchar(detail)) paste0(" | ", detail) else ""))
}

safe_prob <- function(p, eps = 1e-15) pmin(pmax(as.numeric(p), eps), 1 - eps)
safe_logit <- function(p, eps = 1e-15) qlogis(safe_prob(p, eps))

check_binary_y <- function(y, where = "") {
  tb <- table(y)
  if (!all(c("christian", "non_christian") %in% names(tb))) {
    stop(paste0("Both classes are required", if (nzchar(where)) paste0(" in ", where) else "", "."))
  }
  invisible(tb)
}

auc_safe <- function(y, p) {
  p <- safe_prob(p)
  if (length(unique(y)) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  tryCatch(
    as.numeric(pROC::auc(pROC::roc(
      response = y,
      predictor = p,
      levels = c("non_christian", "christian"),
      direction = "<",
      quiet = TRUE
    ))),
    error = function(e) NA_real_
  )
}

auc_margin_safe <- function(y, s) {
  s <- as.numeric(s)
  if (length(unique(y)) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  tryCatch(
    as.numeric(pROC::auc(pROC::roc(
      response = y,
      predictor = s,
      levels = c("non_christian", "christian"),
      direction = "<",
      quiet = TRUE
    ))),
    error = function(e) NA_real_
  )
}

log_loss_safe <- function(y, p) {
  p <- safe_prob(p)
  y01 <- as.integer(y == "christian")
  -mean(y01 * log(p) + (1 - y01) * log(1 - p))
}

brier_safe <- function(y, p) {
  p <- safe_prob(p)
  y01 <- as.integer(y == "christian")
  mean((y01 - p)^2)
}

hard_metrics <- function(y, pred_label) {
  y01 <- as.integer(y == "christian")
  p01 <- as.integer(pred_label == "christian")
  tp <- sum(y01 == 1 & p01 == 1)
  tn <- sum(y01 == 0 & p01 == 0)
  fp <- sum(y01 == 0 & p01 == 1)
  fn <- sum(y01 == 1 & p01 == 0)
  precision <- if ((tp + fp) == 0) NA_real_ else tp / (tp + fp)
  recall <- if ((tp + fn) == 0) NA_real_ else tp / (tp + fn)
  specificity <- if ((tn + fp) == 0) NA_real_ else tn / (tn + fp)
  f1 <- if (is.na(precision) || is.na(recall) || (precision + recall) == 0) NA_real_ else 2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall)
  bal_acc <- mean(c(recall, specificity), na.rm = TRUE)
  mcc_den <- sqrt((tp + fp) * (tp + fn) * (tn + fp) * (tn + fn))
  mcc <- if (mcc_den == 0) NA_real_ else ((tp * tn) - (fp * fn)) / mcc_den
  tibble(
    accuracy = (tp + tn) / length(y),
    balanced_accuracy = bal_acc,
    precision = precision,
    recall = recall,
    specificity = specificity,
    f1 = f1,
    mcc = mcc,
    tp = tp,
    tn = tn,
    fp = fp,
    fn = fn
  )
}

choose_threshold <- function(y, p, metric = c("youden", "f1")) {
  metric <- match.arg(metric)
  p <- safe_prob(p)
  if (metric == "youden") {
    th <- tryCatch(
      pROC::coords(
        pROC::roc(
          response = y,
          predictor = p,
          levels = c("non_christian", "christian"),
          direction = "<",
          quiet = TRUE
        ),
        x = "best",
        input = "threshold",
        best.method = "youden",
        ret = "threshold",
        transpose = FALSE
      ),
      error = function(e) NA_real_
    )
    th <- as.numeric(unlist(th))
    th <- th[is.finite(th)]
    if (length(th) == 0) 0.5 else th[1]
  } else {
    y01 <- as.integer(y == "christian")
    cand <- sort(unique(p))
    cand <- unique(c(0, cand, 0.5, 1))
    f1s <- vapply(cand, function(th) {
      pred01 <- as.integer(p >= th)
      tp <- sum(pred01 == 1 & y01 == 1)
      fp <- sum(pred01 == 1 & y01 == 0)
      fn <- sum(pred01 == 0 & y01 == 1)
      den <- 2 * tp + fp + fn
      if (den == 0) 0 else 2 * tp / den
    }, numeric(1))
    cand[which.max(f1s)][1]
  }
}

summarize_model_fold <- function(y, p, pred_youden, pred_f1, model_name, outer_fold, held_out_author) {
  hy <- hard_metrics(y, pred_youden)
  hf <- hard_metrics(y, pred_f1)
  tibble(
    outer_fold = outer_fold,
    held_out_author = held_out_author,
    model = model_name,
    n = length(y),
    n_christian = sum(y == "christian"),
    n_non_christian = sum(y == "non_christian"),
    auc = auc_safe(y, p),
    log_loss = log_loss_safe(y, p),
    brier = brier_safe(y, p),
    accuracy_youden = hy$accuracy,
    balanced_accuracy_youden = hy$balanced_accuracy,
    precision_youden = hy$precision,
    recall_youden = hy$recall,
    specificity_youden = hy$specificity,
    f1_youden = hy$f1,
    mcc_youden = hy$mcc,
    accuracy_f1 = hf$accuracy,
    balanced_accuracy_f1 = hf$balanced_accuracy,
    precision_f1 = hf$precision,
    recall_f1 = hf$recall,
    specificity_f1 = hf$specificity,
    f1_f1 = hf$f1,
    mcc_f1 = hf$mcc
  )
}

summarize_model_oof <- function(y, p, pred_youden, pred_f1, model_name) {
  hy <- hard_metrics(y, pred_youden)
  hf <- hard_metrics(y, pred_f1)
  tibble(
    model = model_name,
    auc = auc_safe(y, p),
    log_loss = log_loss_safe(y, p),
    brier = brier_safe(y, p),
    accuracy_youden = hy$accuracy,
    balanced_accuracy_youden = hy$balanced_accuracy,
    precision_youden = hy$precision,
    recall_youden = hy$recall,
    specificity_youden = hy$specificity,
    f1_youden = hy$f1,
    mcc_youden = hy$mcc,
    tp_youden = hy$tp,
    tn_youden = hy$tn,
    fp_youden = hy$fp,
    fn_youden = hy$fn,
    accuracy_f1 = hf$accuracy,
    balanced_accuracy_f1 = hf$balanced_accuracy,
    precision_f1 = hf$precision,
    recall_f1 = hf$recall,
    specificity_f1 = hf$specificity,
    f1_f1 = hf$f1,
    mcc_f1 = hf$mcc,
    tp_f1 = hf$tp,
    tn_f1 = hf$tn,
    fp_f1 = hf$fp,
    fn_f1 = hf$fn
  )
}

fit_platt <- function(scores, y) {
  z <- tibble(score = as.numeric(scores), y = as.integer(y == "christian")) %>%
    filter(is.finite(score))
  if (nrow(z) < 10 || length(unique(z$score)) < 2 || length(unique(z$y)) < 2) return(NULL)
  suppressWarnings(
    tryCatch({
      fit <- glm(y ~ score, data = z, family = binomial(), control = glm.control(maxit = 200))
      b1 <- coef(fit)[["score"]]
      if (!is.finite(b1) || abs(b1) > 50) return(NULL)
      fit
    }, error = function(e) NULL)
  )
}

apply_platt <- function(platt, scores) {
  scores <- as.numeric(scores)
  if (is.null(platt)) {
    z <- as.numeric(scale(scores))
    z[!is.finite(z)] <- 0
    safe_prob(plogis(z))
  } else {
    safe_prob(predict(platt, newdata = data.frame(score = scores), type = "response"))
  }
}

make_counts_dfm <- function(text_data, stop_list) {
  quanteda::tokens(text_data, remove_punct = TRUE, remove_numbers = TRUE) %>%
    quanteda::tokens_remove(pattern = stop_list) %>%
    quanteda::dfm()
}

fit_vectorizer <- function(text_data, stop_list, min_df = 3L) {
  x <- make_counts_dfm(text_data, stop_list)
  if (min_df > 1L) {
    x <- quanteda::dfm_trim(x, min_docfreq = min_df, docfreq_type = "count")
  }
  if (quanteda::nfeat(x) == 0) stop("No features remain after filtering.")
  N <- quanteda::ndoc(x)
  n_k <- quanteda::docfreq(x, scheme = "count")
  idf <- log((N + 1) / (n_k + 1)) + 1
  list(features = quanteda::featnames(x), idf = idf, min_df = min_df)
}

transform_counts_dfm <- function(text_data, vec, stop_list) {
  x <- make_counts_dfm(text_data, stop_list)
  quanteda::dfm_match(x, features = vec$features)
}

transform_tfidf_sparse <- function(text_data, vec, stop_list) {
  x_counts <- transform_counts_dfm(text_data, vec, stop_list)
  x_mat <- as(x_counts, "dgCMatrix")
  if (length(x_mat@x) > 0) {
    x_mat@x <- 1 + log(x_mat@x)
  }
  idf_vec <- vec$idf[match(colnames(x_mat), names(vec$idf))]
  idf_vec[is.na(idf_vec)] <- 0
  x_tfidf <- x_mat %*% Matrix::Diagonal(x = idf_vec)
  colnames(x_tfidf) <- colnames(x_mat)
  row_norms <- sqrt(Matrix::rowSums(x_tfidf^2))
  row_norms[row_norms == 0] <- 1
  x_tfidf <- x_tfidf / row_norms
  Matrix::drop0(x_tfidf)
}

nb_prob_christian <- function(pred_obj) {
  if ("christian" %in% colnames(pred_obj)) safe_prob(pred_obj[, "christian"]) else safe_prob(pred_obj[, ncol(pred_obj)])
}

fit_nb_model <- function(x_dfm, y) {
  quanteda.textmodels::textmodel_nb(x_dfm, y)
}

predict_nb_score <- function(fit, newx_dfm) {
  safe_logit(nb_prob_christian(predict(fit, newdata = newx_dfm, type = "probability")))
}

fit_enet_fixed <- function(x, y, alpha, lambda) {
  glmnet::glmnet(
    x = x,
    y = as.integer(y == "christian"),
    family = "binomial",
    alpha = alpha,
    lambda = lambda,
    standardize = TRUE,
    maxit = 1e6
  )
}

predict_enet_score <- function(fit, newx) {
  as.numeric(predict(fit, newx = newx, type = "link"))
}

predict_enet_prob <- function(fit, newx) {
  safe_prob(as.numeric(predict(fit, newx = newx, type = "response")))
}

fit_svm_fixed <- function(x, y, cost) {
  LiblineaR::LiblineaR(
    data = x,
    target = as.integer(y == "christian"),
    type = 1,
    cost = cost,
    bias = TRUE,
    verbose = FALSE
  )
}

predict_svm_score_raw <- function(fit, newx) {
  pred <- predict(fit, newx, decisionValues = TRUE, proba = FALSE)
  dv <- NULL
  if (is.list(pred) && "decisionValues" %in% names(pred)) dv <- pred$decisionValues
  if (is.null(dv)) dv <- attr(pred, "decisionValues")
  if (is.null(dv)) {
    if (is.list(pred) && "predictions" %in% names(pred)) {
      as.numeric(pred$predictions)
    } else {
      as.numeric(pred)
    }
  } else if (is.matrix(dv)) {
    as.numeric(dv[, 1])
  } else {
    as.numeric(dv)
  }
}

make_xgb_params <- function(row, scale_pos_weight = 1, seed = 123) {
  list(
    objective = "binary:logistic",
    eval_metric = "logloss",
    eta = as.numeric(row$eta[1]),
    max_depth = as.integer(row$max_depth[1]),
    min_child_weight = as.numeric(row$min_child_weight[1]),
    subsample = as.numeric(row$subsample[1]),
    colsample_bytree = as.numeric(row$colsample_bytree[1]),
    gamma = as.numeric(row$gamma[1]),
    lambda = 1,
    alpha = 0,
    scale_pos_weight = as.numeric(scale_pos_weight),
    tree_method = "hist",
    verbosity = 0,
    seed = as.integer(seed)
  )
}

fit_xgb_fixed <- function(x, y, params, nrounds, seed = 123) {
  dtrain <- xgboost::xgb.DMatrix(x, label = as.integer(y == "christian"))
  pars <- params
  pars$seed <- as.integer(seed)
  xgboost::xgb.train(
    params = pars,
    data = dtrain,
    nrounds = as.integer(nrounds),
    verbose = 0
  )
}

predict_xgb_prob <- function(fit, newx) {
  safe_prob(as.numeric(predict(fit, xgboost::xgb.DMatrix(newx))))
}

predict_xgb_score <- function(fit, newx) {
  safe_logit(predict_xgb_prob(fit, newx))
}

make_lgb_params <- function(row, seed = 123) {
  list(
    objective = "binary",
    metric = "binary_logloss",
    learning_rate = as.numeric(row$learning_rate[1]),
    num_leaves = as.integer(row$num_leaves[1]),
    min_data_in_leaf = as.integer(row$min_data_in_leaf[1]),
    feature_fraction = as.numeric(row$feature_fraction[1]),
    bagging_fraction = as.numeric(row$bagging_fraction[1]),
    bagging_freq = 1L,
    verbosity = -1L,
    num_threads = 0L,
    seed = as.integer(seed),
    feature_fraction_seed = as.integer(seed),
    bagging_seed = as.integer(seed)
  )
}

fit_lgb_fixed <- function(x, y, params, nrounds) {
  dtrain <- lightgbm::lgb.Dataset(data = x, label = as.integer(y == "christian"))
  lightgbm::lgb.train(
    params = params,
    data = dtrain,
    nrounds = as.integer(nrounds),
    verbose = -1
  )
}

predict_lgb_prob <- function(fit, newx, num_iteration) {
  safe_prob(as.numeric(predict(fit, newx, num_iteration = as.integer(num_iteration))))
}

predict_lgb_score <- function(fit, newx, num_iteration) {
  safe_logit(predict_lgb_prob(fit, newx, num_iteration = num_iteration))
}

detect_author_column <- function(df) {
  preferred <- c(
    "author", "author_clean", "author_name", "author_short",
    "source_author", "creator", "source_creator",
    "author_normalized", "canonical_author"
  )
  hit <- preferred[preferred %in% names(df)]
  if (length(hit) > 0) return(hit[1])
  rx <- names(df)[stringr::str_detect(names(df), regex("author|creator", ignore_case = TRUE))]
  if (length(rx) > 0) return(rx[1])
  stop("Could not detect an author column in corpus_600ad.csv.")
}

normalize_author <- function(x) {
  x <- stri_trim_both(as.character(x))
  x[x == "" | is.na(x)] <- NA_character_
  x
}

make_author_cv_id <- function(x) {
  x <- normalize_author(x)
  y <- stringi::stri_trans_general(x, "Any-Latin; Latin-ASCII")
  y <- tolower(y)
  y <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "_", y)
  y <- gsub("^_+|_+$", "", y)
  y
}
```

```{r}
make_logo_folds <- function(groups) {
  gs <- unique(groups)
  names(gs) <- gs
  lapply(gs, function(g) which(groups == g))
}

make_group_stratified_folds <- function(groups, y, k = 5L, seed = 123) {
  group_df <- tibble(group = groups, y = y) %>%
    count(group, y, name = "n") %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = y, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

  if (!"christian" %in% names(group_df)) group_df$christian <- 0L
  if (!"non_christian" %in% names(group_df)) group_df$non_christian <- 0L

  group_df <- group_df %>%
    mutate(
      christian = as.integer(christian),
      non_christian = as.integer(non_christian),
      n_total = christian + non_christian,
      prop_pos = dplyr::if_else(n_total > 0, christian / n_total, 0)
    )

  n_groups <- nrow(group_df)
  k_use <- min(as.integer(k), n_groups)
  if (k_use < 2) return(list())

  target_total <- sum(group_df$n_total) / k_use
  target_pos <- sum(group_df$christian) / k_use
  target_neg <- sum(group_df$non_christian) / k_use

  set.seed(seed)
  prop_center <- mean(group_df$prop_pos, na.rm = TRUE)

  group_df <- group_df %>%
    slice_sample(prop = 1) %>%
    mutate(sort_dev = abs(prop_pos - prop_center)) %>%
    arrange(desc(sort_dev), desc(n_total), desc(christian)) %>%
    select(-sort_dev)

  fold_stats <- tibble(
    fold = seq_len(k_use),
    n_total = 0,
    christian = 0,
    non_christian = 0
  )

  assignment <- integer(n_groups)

  for (i in seq_len(n_groups)) {
    row <- group_df[i, ]
    losses <- vapply(seq_len(k_use), function(f) {
      nt <- fold_stats$n_total[f] + row$n_total
      np <- fold_stats$christian[f] + row$christian
      nn <- fold_stats$non_christian[f] + row$non_christian
      ((nt - target_total) / max(1, target_total))^2 +
        ((np - target_pos) / max(1, target_pos))^2 +
        ((nn - target_neg) / max(1, target_neg))^2
    }, numeric(1))
    best_fold <- which.min(losses)
    assignment[i] <- best_fold
    fold_stats$n_total[best_fold] <- fold_stats$n_total[best_fold] + row$n_total
    fold_stats$christian[best_fold] <- fold_stats$christian[best_fold] + row$christian
    fold_stats$non_christian[best_fold] <- fold_stats$non_christian[best_fold] + row$non_christian
  }

  group_df$fold <- assignment
  lapply(split(group_df$group, group_df$fold), function(gs) which(groups %in% gs))
}

build_inner_fold_plan <- function(text, y, groups, stop_list, k = 5L, seed = 123, min_df = 3L) {
  folds <- make_group_stratified_folds(groups, y, k = k, seed = seed)
  plans <- list()
  if (length(folds) == 0) return(plans)
  idx_all <- seq_along(y)
  ctr <- 0L
  for (j in seq_along(folds)) {
    va <- folds[[j]]
    tr <- setdiff(idx_all, va)
    if (length(va) == 0 || length(tr) == 0) next
    if (length(unique(y[tr])) < 2) next
    ctr <- ctr + 1L
    vec <- fit_vectorizer(text[tr], stop_list, min_df = min_df)
    plans[[ctr]] <- list(
      fold_id = j,
      tr = tr,
      va = va,
      y_tr = y[tr],
      y_va = y[va],
      vec = vec,
      x_tr_dfm = transform_counts_dfm(text[tr], vec, stop_list),
      x_va_dfm = transform_counts_dfm(text[va], vec, stop_list),
      x_tr = transform_tfidf_sparse(text[tr], vec, stop_list),
      x_va = transform_tfidf_sparse(text[va], vec, stop_list)
    )
  }
  plans
}

maybe_flip_scores <- function(scores, y) {
  if (!all(is.finite(scores))) return(list(scores = scores, sign = 1))
  auc0 <- auc_margin_safe(y, scores)
  if (!is.na(auc0) && auc0 < 0.5) {
    list(scores = -scores, sign = -1)
  } else {
    list(scores = scores, sign = 1)
  }
}

cv_scores_nb <- function(plans) {
  scores <- rep(NA_real_, max(unlist(lapply(plans, function(z) c(z$tr, z$va)))))
  for (pl in plans) {
    fit <- fit_nb_model(pl$x_tr_dfm, pl$y_tr)
    scores[pl$va] <- predict_nb_score(fit, pl$x_va_dfm)
  }
  scores
}

cv_scores_enet <- function(plans, alpha, lambda) {
  scores <- rep(NA_real_, max(unlist(lapply(plans, function(z) c(z$tr, z$va)))))
  for (pl in plans) {
    fit <- fit_enet_fixed(pl$x_tr, pl$y_tr, alpha = alpha, lambda = lambda)
    scores[pl$va] <- predict_enet_score(fit, pl$x_va)
  }
  scores
}

cv_scores_svm <- function(plans, cost) {
  scores <- rep(NA_real_, max(unlist(lapply(plans, function(z) c(z$tr, z$va)))))
  y_all <- rep(NA_character_, length(scores))
  for (pl in plans) {
    fit <- fit_svm_fixed(pl$x_tr, pl$y_tr, cost = cost)
    scores[pl$va] <- predict_svm_score_raw(fit, pl$x_va)
    y_all[pl$va] <- pl$y_va
  }
  flip <- maybe_flip_scores(scores[is.finite(scores)], y_all[is.finite(scores)])
  sign <- flip$sign
  list(scores = sign * scores, sign = sign)
}

cv_scores_xgb <- function(plans, cand, seed = 123) {
  scores <- rep(NA_real_, max(unlist(lapply(plans, function(z) c(z$tr, z$va)))))
  for (j in seq_along(plans)) {
    pl <- plans[[j]]
    n_pos <- sum(pl$y_tr == "christian")
    n_neg <- sum(pl$y_tr == "non_christian")
    pars <- make_xgb_params(cand, scale_pos_weight = n_neg / max(n_pos, 1), seed = seed + j)
    fit <- fit_xgb_fixed(pl$x_tr, pl$y_tr, params = pars, nrounds = cand$best_nrounds[1], seed = seed + j)
    scores[pl$va] <- predict_xgb_score(fit, pl$x_va)
  }
  scores
}

cv_scores_lgb <- function(plans, cand, seed = 123) {
  scores <- rep(NA_real_, max(unlist(lapply(plans, function(z) c(z$tr, z$va)))))
  for (j in seq_along(plans)) {
    pl <- plans[[j]]
    pars <- make_lgb_params(cand, seed = seed + j)
    fit <- fit_lgb_fixed(pl$x_tr, pl$y_tr, params = pars, nrounds = cand$best_nrounds[1])
    scores[pl$va] <- predict_lgb_score(fit, pl$x_va, num_iteration = cand$best_nrounds[1])
  }
  scores
}

evaluate_enet_candidates <- function(plans, y, candidates) {
  rows <- vector("list", nrow(candidates))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(candidates))) {
    sc <- cv_scores_enet(plans, alpha = candidates$alpha[i], lambda = candidates$lambda[i])
    keep <- is.finite(sc)
    rows[[i]] <- candidates[i, , drop = FALSE] %>%
      mutate(
        candidate_id = i,
        log_loss = log_loss_safe(y[keep], plogis(sc[keep])),
        auc = auc_safe(y[keep], plogis(sc[keep]))
      )
  }
  bind_rows(rows) %>% arrange(log_loss, desc(auc), alpha, desc(lambda))
}

evaluate_svm_candidates <- function(plans, y, candidates) {
  rows <- vector("list", nrow(candidates))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(candidates))) {
    sc <- cv_scores_svm(plans, cost = candidates$cost[i])
    keep <- is.finite(sc$scores)
    rows[[i]] <- candidates[i, , drop = FALSE] %>%
      mutate(
        candidate_id = i,
        auc_margin = auc_margin_safe(y[keep], sc$scores[keep]),
        sign = sc$sign
      )
  }
  bind_rows(rows) %>% arrange(desc(auc_margin), cost)
}

evaluate_xgb_candidates <- function(plans, y, candidates, seed = 123) {
  rows <- vector("list", nrow(candidates))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(candidates))) {
    sc <- cv_scores_xgb(plans, cand = candidates[i, , drop = FALSE], seed = seed + 100L * i)
    keep <- is.finite(sc)
    rows[[i]] <- candidates[i, , drop = FALSE] %>%
      mutate(
        candidate_id = i,
        log_loss = log_loss_safe(y[keep], plogis(sc[keep])),
        auc = auc_safe(y[keep], plogis(sc[keep]))
      )
  }
  bind_rows(rows) %>% arrange(log_loss, desc(auc), best_nrounds)
}

evaluate_lgb_candidates <- function(plans, y, candidates, seed = 123) {
  rows <- vector("list", nrow(candidates))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(candidates))) {
    sc <- cv_scores_lgb(plans, cand = candidates[i, , drop = FALSE], seed = seed + 100L * i)
    keep <- is.finite(sc)
    rows[[i]] <- candidates[i, , drop = FALSE] %>%
      mutate(
        candidate_id = i,
        log_loss = log_loss_safe(y[keep], plogis(sc[keep])),
        auc = auc_safe(y[keep], plogis(sc[keep]))
      )
  }
  bind_rows(rows) %>% arrange(log_loss, desc(auc), best_nrounds)
}
```


```{r}
find_hyperparameter_file <- function() {
  candidates <- c(
    file.path(hyperparam_search_root, "model_hyperparameters_full.csv"),
    file.path(hyperparam_search_root, "model_hyperparameters_full"),
    "model_hyperparameters_full.csv",
    "model_hyperparameters_full(10).csv"
  )
  hit <- candidates[file.exists(candidates)]
  if (length(hit) == 0) {
    stop("Could not find model_hyperparameters_full. Put it in ../../results/predictions or the working directory.")
  }
  hit[1]
}

get_hp_row <- function(hp, model_name) {
  out <- hp %>% filter(model == model_name)
  if (nrow(out) == 0) stop(paste("No row found in hyperparameter table for model:", model_name))
  out[1, , drop = FALSE]
}

finite_or <- function(x, default) {
  x <- as.numeric(x[1])
  if (length(x) == 0 || !is.finite(x)) default else x
}

build_enet_candidates <- function(row) {
  alpha0 <- finite_or(row$alpha, 0.2)
  lambda0 <- finite_or(row$lambda_1se, finite_or(row$lambda_min, 0.02))
  alpha_grid <- sort(unique(pmin(pmax(c(alpha0 / 2, alpha0, alpha0 * 2), 0.01), 0.95)))
  lambda_grid <- sort(unique(c(lambda0 / 2, lambda0, lambda0 * 2)))
  tidyr::crossing(alpha = alpha_grid, lambda = lambda_grid)
}

build_svm_candidates <- function(row) {
  cost0 <- finite_or(row$cost, 1)
  tibble(cost = sort(unique(c(cost0 / 4, cost0, cost0 * 4))))
}

build_xgb_candidates <- function(row) {
  eta0 <- finite_or(row$eta, 0.05)
  depth0 <- as.integer(round(finite_or(row$max_depth, 3)))
  mcw0 <- finite_or(row$min_child_weight, 1)
  subs0 <- finite_or(row$subsample, 0.7)
  col0 <- finite_or(row$colsample_bytree, 0.8)
  gam0 <- finite_or(row$gamma, 0.5)
  nr0 <- as.integer(round(finite_or(row$best_nrounds, 400)))
  tibble(
    eta = c(eta0, max(0.01, eta0 / 2), min(0.2, eta0 * 2), eta0, eta0),
    max_depth = c(depth0, depth0, depth0, max(2L, depth0 - 1L), min(10L, depth0 + 1L)),
    min_child_weight = c(mcw0, mcw0, mcw0, max(1, mcw0 * 2), mcw0),
    subsample = subs0,
    colsample_bytree = col0,
    gamma = gam0,
    best_nrounds = nr0
  ) %>% distinct()
}

build_lgb_candidates <- function(row) {
  lr0 <- finite_or(row$learning_rate, 0.03)
  leaves0 <- as.integer(round(finite_or(row$num_leaves, 31)))
  mdl0 <- as.integer(round(finite_or(row$min_data_in_leaf, 20)))
  ff0 <- finite_or(row$feature_fraction, 0.6)
  bf0 <- finite_or(row$bagging_fraction, 0.7)
  nr0 <- as.integer(round(finite_or(row$best_nrounds, 200)))
  tibble(
    learning_rate = c(lr0, max(0.005, lr0 / 2), min(0.1, lr0 * 2), lr0, lr0),
    num_leaves = c(leaves0, leaves0, leaves0, max(7L, floor(leaves0 / 2)), min(127L, leaves0 * 2L)),
    min_data_in_leaf = c(mdl0, mdl0, mdl0, mdl0, max(5L, floor(mdl0 / 2))),
    feature_fraction = ff0,
    bagging_fraction = bf0,
    best_nrounds = nr0
  ) %>% distinct()
}

save_rds_atomic <- function(object, path) {
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  tmp <- paste0(path, ".tmp_", Sys.getpid(), "_", format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d%H%M%S"))
  saveRDS(object, tmp)
  ok <- file.rename(tmp, path)
  if (!ok) {
    file.copy(tmp, path, overwrite = TRUE)
    unlink(tmp)
  }
  invisible(path)
}

log_progress("load_data", "reading corpus and labels")

df <- readr::read_csv(file.path(data_path, "corpus_600ad.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(id = as.character(id)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(text) & text != "") %>%
  mutate(row_id = row_number())

author_col <- detect_author_column(df)

labels_raw <- readr::read_csv(file.path(data_path, "corpus_600ad_labeled.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(id = as.character(id)) %>%
  filter(label %in% c("christian", "non_christian")) %>%
  distinct(id, label)

label_conflicts <- labels_raw %>%
  count(id, name = "n_labels") %>%
  filter(n_labels > 1)

if (nrow(label_conflicts) > 0) {
  stop(paste0("Conflicting labels in corpus_600ad_labeled.csv: ", paste(head(label_conflicts$id, 20), collapse = ", ")))
}

labels <- labels_raw %>%
  transmute(id, manual_label = label)

df_labeled <- df %>%
  inner_join(labels, by = "id") %>%
  mutate(
    author_original = normalize_author(.data[[author_col]]),
    author_cv = make_author_cv_id(.data[[author_col]])
  )

if (any(is.na(df_labeled$author_original) | df_labeled$author_cv == "")) {
  bad_ids <- df_labeled %>% filter(is.na(author_original) | author_cv == "") %>% pull(id)
  stop(paste0("Missing author information for labeled documents: ", paste(head(bad_ids, 20), collapse = ", ")))
}

check_binary_y(df_labeled$manual_label, "labeled data")

custom_additions <- c("m", "c", "l", "d", "gt", "lt", "br", "href", "fridericus", "heinricus", "conradus", "meus", "tuus")
stops_v1 <- scan("../../data/stopwords/stopwords_latin1.txt", what = "character", quiet = TRUE, encoding = "UTF-8")
stops_v2 <- scan("../../data/stopwords/stopwords_latin2.txt", what = "character", comment.char = "#", quiet = TRUE, encoding = "UTF-8")
latin_stops <- sort(unique(c(stops_v1, stops_v2, custom_additions)))
latin_stops <- latin_stops[latin_stops != "*"]

lab <- df_labeled %>% arrange(author_cv, row_id)
out <- df %>%
  mutate(
    author_original = normalize_author(.data[[author_col]]),
    author_cv = make_author_cv_id(.data[[author_col]])
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    lab %>% select(row_id, manual_label),
    by = "row_id"
  )

hp_path <- find_hyperparameter_file()
hyperparameters_full <- readr::read_csv(hp_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

enet_candidates_all <- build_enet_candidates(get_hp_row(hyperparameters_full, "elastic_net"))
svm_candidates_all  <- build_svm_candidates(get_hp_row(hyperparameters_full, "svm_platt"))
xgb_candidates_all  <- build_xgb_candidates(get_hp_row(hyperparameters_full, "xgboost"))
lgb_candidates_all  <- build_lgb_candidates(get_hp_row(hyperparameters_full, "lightgbm"))

outer_folds <- make_logo_folds(lab$author_cv)
held_out_authors <- names(outer_folds)
n_lab <- nrow(lab)

oof <- tibble(
  row_id = lab$row_id,
  id = lab$id,
  author_original = lab$author_original,
  author_cv = lab$author_cv,
  manual_label = lab$manual_label,
  outer_fold = NA_integer_,
  held_out_author = NA_character_,
  nb_oof = NA_real_,
  nb_score_oof = NA_real_,
  nb_pred_youden_oof = NA_character_,
  nb_pred_f1_oof = NA_character_,
  prob_enet = NA_real_,
  score_enet_logit = NA_real_,
  label_enet_youden = NA_character_,
  label_enet_f1 = NA_character_,
  svm_oof = NA_real_,
  svm_score_oof = NA_real_,
  svm_pred_youden_oof = NA_character_,
  svm_pred_f1_oof = NA_character_,
  xgb_oof = NA_real_,
  xgb_score_oof = NA_real_,
  xgb_pred_youden_oof = NA_character_,
  xgb_pred_f1_oof = NA_character_,
  lgb_oof = NA_real_,
  lgb_score_oof = NA_real_,
  lgb_pred_youden_oof = NA_character_,
  lgb_pred_f1_oof = NA_character_
)

START_FROM_SCRATCH <- FALSE
SAVE_FOLD_FITS <- TRUE

checkpoint_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "_checkpoints")
fold_checkpoint_dir <- file.path(checkpoint_dir, "outer_folds")
full_checkpoint_dir <- file.path(checkpoint_dir, "full_refit")

if (isTRUE(START_FROM_SCRATCH)) {
  unlink(checkpoint_dir, recursive = TRUE, force = TRUE)
  unlink(file.path(output_dir, c(
    "oof_predictions_labeled.csv",
    "outer_fold_metrics.csv",
    "outer_thresholds.csv",
    "selected_outer_hyperparameters.csv",
    "oof_model_metrics.csv",
    "full_corpus_model_scores.csv",
    "loao_run_metadata.rds"
  )), force = TRUE)
}

dir.create(fold_checkpoint_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(full_checkpoint_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

safe_bind_rows <- function(xs) {
  if (length(xs) == 0) tibble() else dplyr::bind_rows(xs)
}

read_rds_or_null <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(NULL)
  tryCatch(readRDS(path), error = function(e) NULL)
}

fold_checkpoint_file <- function(i, held_out_author) {
  file.path(fold_checkpoint_dir, sprintf("outer_fold_%04d_%s.rds", as.integer(i), held_out_author))
}

valid_fold_checkpoint <- function(z, i, va, oof_cols) {
  is.list(z) &&
    !is.null(z$outer_fold) && as.integer(z$outer_fold) == as.integer(i) &&
    !is.null(z$va) && identical(as.integer(z$va), as.integer(va)) &&
    is.data.frame(z$oof_rows) && nrow(z$oof_rows) == length(va) &&
    all(oof_cols %in% names(z$oof_rows)) &&
    is.data.frame(z$fold_metrics) &&
    is.data.frame(z$thresholds) &&
    is.data.frame(z$selected_hyperparameters)
}

fold_metric_rows <- list()
threshold_rows <- list()
selected_rows <- list()

existing_oof_path <- file.path(output_dir, "oof_predictions_labeled.csv")
existing_metrics_path <- file.path(output_dir, "outer_fold_metrics.csv")
existing_thresholds_path <- file.path(output_dir, "outer_thresholds.csv")
existing_selected_path <- file.path(output_dir, "selected_outer_hyperparameters.csv")

if (!isTRUE(START_FROM_SCRATCH) && file.exists(existing_oof_path)) {
  old_oof <- suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(existing_oof_path, show_col_types = FALSE))
  if (all(names(oof) %in% names(old_oof)) && identical(as.character(old_oof$row_id), as.character(oof$row_id))) {
    oof <- old_oof[, names(oof)]
    log_progress("resume_csv", "loaded existing oof_predictions_labeled.csv")
  } else {
    log_progress("resume_csv_ignored", "existing oof_predictions_labeled.csv does not match current rows/columns")
  }
}

if (!isTRUE(START_FROM_SCRATCH) && file.exists(existing_metrics_path)) {
  fold_metric_rows <- list(suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(existing_metrics_path, show_col_types = FALSE)))
}
if (!isTRUE(START_FROM_SCRATCH) && file.exists(existing_thresholds_path)) {
  threshold_rows <- list(suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(existing_thresholds_path, show_col_types = FALSE)))
}
if (!isTRUE(START_FROM_SCRATCH) && file.exists(existing_selected_path)) {
  selected_rows <- list(suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(existing_selected_path, show_col_types = FALSE)))
}

oof_complete_cols <- c(
  "nb_oof", "nb_score_oof", "nb_pred_youden_oof", "nb_pred_f1_oof",
  "prob_enet", "score_enet_logit", "label_enet_youden", "label_enet_f1",
  "svm_oof", "svm_score_oof", "svm_pred_youden_oof", "svm_pred_f1_oof",
  "xgb_oof", "xgb_score_oof", "xgb_pred_youden_oof", "xgb_pred_f1_oof",
  "lgb_oof", "lgb_score_oof", "lgb_pred_youden_oof", "lgb_pred_f1_oof"
)

fold_complete_in_oof <- function(va) {
  all(oof_complete_cols %in% names(oof)) &&
    all(!is.na(oof$outer_fold[va])) &&
    all(vapply(oof[va, oof_complete_cols], function(x) all(!is.na(x)), logical(1)))
}

write_outer_progress <- function() {
  fm <- safe_bind_rows(fold_metric_rows)
  th <- safe_bind_rows(threshold_rows)
  se <- safe_bind_rows(selected_rows)

  if (all(c("outer_fold", "model") %in% names(fm))) {
    fm <- fm %>% distinct(outer_fold, model, .keep_all = TRUE)
  }
  if (all(c("outer_fold", "model") %in% names(th))) {
    th <- th %>% distinct(outer_fold, model, .keep_all = TRUE)
  }
  if (all(c("outer_fold", "model") %in% names(se))) {
    se <- se %>% distinct(outer_fold, model, .keep_all = TRUE)
  }

  write_csv_atomic(oof, file.path(output_dir, "oof_predictions_labeled.csv"))
  write_csv_atomic(fm, file.path(output_dir, "outer_fold_metrics.csv"))
  write_csv_atomic(th, file.path(output_dir, "outer_thresholds.csv"))
  write_csv_atomic(se, file.path(output_dir, "selected_outer_hyperparameters.csv"))
}

merge_fold_checkpoint <- function(z) {
  oof[z$va, ] <<- z$oof_rows[, names(oof)]
  fold_metric_rows[[length(fold_metric_rows) + 1L]] <<- z$fold_metrics
  threshold_rows[[length(threshold_rows) + 1L]] <<- z$thresholds
  selected_rows[[length(selected_rows) + 1L]] <<- z$selected_hyperparameters
}

for (i in seq_along(outer_folds)) {
  va <- outer_folds[[i]]
  tr <- setdiff(seq_len(n_lab), va)
  held_out_author <- held_out_authors[i]
  fold_file <- fold_checkpoint_file(i, held_out_author)
  old_fold <- read_rds_or_null(fold_file)

  if (valid_fold_checkpoint(old_fold, i, va, names(oof))) {
    log_progress("outer_fold_skip", paste("fold", i, "of", length(outer_folds), "| held-out author =", held_out_author))
    merge_fold_checkpoint(old_fold)
    write_outer_progress()
    next
  }

  if (fold_complete_in_oof(va)) {
    log_progress("outer_fold_skip_csv", paste("fold", i, "of", length(outer_folds), "| held-out author =", held_out_author))
    write_outer_progress()
    next
  }

  log_progress("outer_fold_start", paste("fold", i, "of", length(outer_folds), "| held-out author =", held_out_author))

  y_tr <- lab$manual_label[tr]
  y_va <- lab$manual_label[va]
  check_binary_y(y_tr, paste("outer train fold", i))

  vec_outer <- fit_vectorizer(lab$text[tr], latin_stops, min_df = 3L)
  x_tr_dfm <- transform_counts_dfm(lab$text[tr], vec_outer, latin_stops)
  x_va_dfm <- transform_counts_dfm(lab$text[va], vec_outer, latin_stops)
  x_tr <- transform_tfidf_sparse(lab$text[tr], vec_outer, latin_stops)
  x_va <- transform_tfidf_sparse(lab$text[va], vec_outer, latin_stops)

  inner_plans <- build_inner_fold_plan(
    text = lab$text[tr],
    y = y_tr,
    groups = lab$author_cv[tr],
    stop_list = latin_stops,
    k = 5L,
    seed = 1000 + i,
    min_df = 3L
  )

  if (length(inner_plans) == 0) {
    stop(paste("No valid author-blocked inner folds for outer fold", i))
  }

  oof$outer_fold[va] <- i
  oof$held_out_author[va] <- held_out_author

  fold_metrics_this <- list()
  thresholds_this <- list()
  selected_this <- list()

  nb_train_scores <- cv_scores_nb(inner_plans)
  nb_platt <- fit_platt(nb_train_scores, y_tr)
  nb_fit <- fit_nb_model(x_tr_dfm, y_tr)
  nb_va_scores <- predict_nb_score(nb_fit, x_va_dfm)
  nb_train_prob <- apply_platt(nb_platt, nb_train_scores)
  nb_va_prob <- apply_platt(nb_platt, nb_va_scores)
  nb_th_y <- choose_threshold(y_tr, nb_train_prob, "youden")
  nb_th_f <- choose_threshold(y_tr, nb_train_prob, "f1")

  oof$nb_oof[va] <- nb_va_prob
  oof$nb_score_oof[va] <- nb_va_scores
  oof$nb_pred_youden_oof[va] <- ifelse(nb_va_prob >= nb_th_y, "christian", "non_christian")
  oof$nb_pred_f1_oof[va] <- ifelse(nb_va_prob >= nb_th_f, "christian", "non_christian")

  fold_metrics_this[[length(fold_metrics_this) + 1L]] <- summarize_model_fold(
    y_va, nb_va_prob, oof$nb_pred_youden_oof[va], oof$nb_pred_f1_oof[va], "naive_bayes", i, held_out_author
  )
  thresholds_this[[length(thresholds_this) + 1L]] <- tibble(
    outer_fold = i, held_out_author = held_out_author, model = "naive_bayes",
    threshold_youden = nb_th_y, threshold_f1 = nb_th_f
  )
  selected_this[[length(selected_this) + 1L]] <- tibble(
    outer_fold = i, held_out_author = held_out_author, model = "naive_bayes"
  )

  enet_eval <- evaluate_enet_candidates(inner_plans, y_tr, enet_candidates_all)
  enet_best <- enet_eval[1, , drop = FALSE]
  enet_train_scores <- cv_scores_enet(inner_plans, alpha = enet_best$alpha[1], lambda = enet_best$lambda[1])
  enet_platt <- fit_platt(enet_train_scores, y_tr)
  enet_fit <- fit_enet_fixed(x_tr, y_tr, alpha = enet_best$alpha[1], lambda = enet_best$lambda[1])
  enet_va_scores <- predict_enet_score(enet_fit, x_va)
  enet_train_prob <- apply_platt(enet_platt, enet_train_scores)
  enet_va_prob <- apply_platt(enet_platt, enet_va_scores)
  enet_th_y <- choose_threshold(y_tr, enet_train_prob, "youden")
  enet_th_f <- choose_threshold(y_tr, enet_train_prob, "f1")

  oof$prob_enet[va] <- enet_va_prob
  oof$score_enet_logit[va] <- enet_va_scores
  oof$label_enet_youden[va] <- ifelse(enet_va_prob >= enet_th_y, "christian", "non_christian")
  oof$label_enet_f1[va] <- ifelse(enet_va_prob >= enet_th_f, "christian", "non_christian")

  fold_metrics_this[[length(fold_metrics_this) + 1L]] <- summarize_model_fold(
    y_va, enet_va_prob, oof$label_enet_youden[va], oof$label_enet_f1[va], "enet", i, held_out_author
  )
  thresholds_this[[length(thresholds_this) + 1L]] <- tibble(
    outer_fold = i, held_out_author = held_out_author, model = "enet",
    threshold_youden = enet_th_y, threshold_f1 = enet_th_f
  )
  selected_this[[length(selected_this) + 1L]] <- enet_best %>%
    mutate(outer_fold = i, held_out_author = held_out_author, model = "enet")

  svm_eval <- evaluate_svm_candidates(inner_plans, y_tr, svm_candidates_all)
  svm_best <- svm_eval[1, , drop = FALSE]
  svm_train_res <- cv_scores_svm(inner_plans, cost = svm_best$cost[1])
  svm_train_scores <- svm_train_res$scores
  svm_platt <- fit_platt(svm_train_scores, y_tr)
  svm_fit <- fit_svm_fixed(x_tr, y_tr, cost = svm_best$cost[1])
  svm_va_scores <- svm_best$sign[1] * predict_svm_score_raw(svm_fit, x_va)
  svm_train_prob <- apply_platt(svm_platt, svm_train_scores)
  svm_va_prob <- apply_platt(svm_platt, svm_va_scores)
  svm_th_y <- choose_threshold(y_tr, svm_train_prob, "youden")
  svm_th_f <- choose_threshold(y_tr, svm_train_prob, "f1")

  oof$svm_oof[va] <- svm_va_prob
  oof$svm_score_oof[va] <- svm_va_scores
  oof$svm_pred_youden_oof[va] <- ifelse(svm_va_prob >= svm_th_y, "christian", "non_christian")
  oof$svm_pred_f1_oof[va] <- ifelse(svm_va_prob >= svm_th_f, "christian", "non_christian")

  fold_metrics_this[[length(fold_metrics_this) + 1L]] <- summarize_model_fold(
    y_va, svm_va_prob, oof$svm_pred_youden_oof[va], oof$svm_pred_f1_oof[va], "svm_platt", i, held_out_author
  )
  thresholds_this[[length(thresholds_this) + 1L]] <- tibble(
    outer_fold = i, held_out_author = held_out_author, model = "svm_platt",
    threshold_youden = svm_th_y, threshold_f1 = svm_th_f
  )
  selected_this[[length(selected_this) + 1L]] <- svm_best %>%
    mutate(outer_fold = i, held_out_author = held_out_author, model = "svm_platt")

  xgb_eval <- evaluate_xgb_candidates(inner_plans, y_tr, xgb_candidates_all, seed = 2000 + i)
  xgb_best <- xgb_eval[1, , drop = FALSE]
  xgb_train_scores <- cv_scores_xgb(inner_plans, cand = xgb_best, seed = 3000 + i)
  xgb_platt <- fit_platt(xgb_train_scores, y_tr)
  n_pos_tr <- sum(y_tr == "christian")
  n_neg_tr <- sum(y_tr == "non_christian")
  xgb_params <- make_xgb_params(xgb_best, scale_pos_weight = n_neg_tr / max(n_pos_tr, 1), seed = 4000 + i)
  xgb_fit <- fit_xgb_fixed(x_tr, y_tr, params = xgb_params, nrounds = xgb_best$best_nrounds[1], seed = 4000 + i)
  xgb_va_scores <- predict_xgb_score(xgb_fit, x_va)
  xgb_train_prob <- apply_platt(xgb_platt, xgb_train_scores)
  xgb_va_prob <- apply_platt(xgb_platt, xgb_va_scores)
  xgb_th_y <- choose_threshold(y_tr, xgb_train_prob, "youden")
  xgb_th_f <- choose_threshold(y_tr, xgb_train_prob, "f1")

  oof$xgb_oof[va] <- xgb_va_prob
  oof$xgb_score_oof[va] <- xgb_va_scores
  oof$xgb_pred_youden_oof[va] <- ifelse(xgb_va_prob >= xgb_th_y, "christian", "non_christian")
  oof$xgb_pred_f1_oof[va] <- ifelse(xgb_va_prob >= xgb_th_f, "christian", "non_christian")

  fold_metrics_this[[length(fold_metrics_this) + 1L]] <- summarize_model_fold(
    y_va, xgb_va_prob, oof$xgb_pred_youden_oof[va], oof$xgb_pred_f1_oof[va], "xgboost", i, held_out_author
  )
  thresholds_this[[length(thresholds_this) + 1L]] <- tibble(
    outer_fold = i, held_out_author = held_out_author, model = "xgboost",
    threshold_youden = xgb_th_y, threshold_f1 = xgb_th_f
  )
  selected_this[[length(selected_this) + 1L]] <- xgb_best %>%
    mutate(outer_fold = i, held_out_author = held_out_author, model = "xgboost")

  lgb_eval <- evaluate_lgb_candidates(inner_plans, y_tr, lgb_candidates_all, seed = 5000 + i)
  lgb_best <- lgb_eval[1, , drop = FALSE]
  lgb_train_scores <- cv_scores_lgb(inner_plans, cand = lgb_best, seed = 6000 + i)
  lgb_platt <- fit_platt(lgb_train_scores, y_tr)
  lgb_params <- make_lgb_params(lgb_best, seed = 7000 + i)
  lgb_fit <- fit_lgb_fixed(x_tr, y_tr, params = lgb_params, nrounds = lgb_best$best_nrounds[1])
  lgb_va_scores <- predict_lgb_score(lgb_fit, x_va, num_iteration = lgb_best$best_nrounds[1])
  lgb_train_prob <- apply_platt(lgb_platt, lgb_train_scores)
  lgb_va_prob <- apply_platt(lgb_platt, lgb_va_scores)
  lgb_th_y <- choose_threshold(y_tr, lgb_train_prob, "youden")
  lgb_th_f <- choose_threshold(y_tr, lgb_train_prob, "f1")

  oof$lgb_oof[va] <- lgb_va_prob
  oof$lgb_score_oof[va] <- lgb_va_scores
  oof$lgb_pred_youden_oof[va] <- ifelse(lgb_va_prob >= lgb_th_y, "christian", "non_christian")
  oof$lgb_pred_f1_oof[va] <- ifelse(lgb_va_prob >= lgb_th_f, "christian", "non_christian")

  fold_metrics_this[[length(fold_metrics_this) + 1L]] <- summarize_model_fold(
    y_va, lgb_va_prob, oof$lgb_pred_youden_oof[va], oof$lgb_pred_f1_oof[va], "lightgbm", i, held_out_author
  )
  thresholds_this[[length(thresholds_this) + 1L]] <- tibble(
    outer_fold = i, held_out_author = held_out_author, model = "lightgbm",
    threshold_youden = lgb_th_y, threshold_f1 = lgb_th_f
  )
  selected_this[[length(selected_this) + 1L]] <- lgb_best %>%
    mutate(outer_fold = i, held_out_author = held_out_author, model = "lightgbm")

  fold_result <- list(
    completed_at = Sys.time(),
    outer_fold = i,
    held_out_author = held_out_author,
    va = va,
    row_id = lab$row_id[va],
    id = lab$id[va],
    oof_rows = oof[va, ],
    fold_metrics = safe_bind_rows(fold_metrics_this),
    thresholds = safe_bind_rows(thresholds_this),
    selected_hyperparameters = safe_bind_rows(selected_this),
    fits = if (isTRUE(SAVE_FOLD_FITS)) list(
      vectorizer = vec_outer,
      naive_bayes = list(fit = nb_fit, platt = nb_platt, threshold_youden = nb_th_y, threshold_f1 = nb_th_f),
      enet = list(fit = enet_fit, platt = enet_platt, selected = enet_best, threshold_youden = enet_th_y, threshold_f1 = enet_th_f),
      svm_platt = list(fit = svm_fit, platt = svm_platt, selected = svm_best, threshold_youden = svm_th_y, threshold_f1 = svm_th_f),
      xgboost = list(fit = xgb_fit, platt = xgb_platt, selected = xgb_best, params = xgb_params, threshold_youden = xgb_th_y, threshold_f1 = xgb_th_f),
      lightgbm = list(fit = lgb_fit, platt = lgb_platt, selected = lgb_best, params = lgb_params, threshold_youden = lgb_th_y, threshold_f1 = lgb_th_f)
    ) else NULL
  )

  save_rds_atomic(fold_result, fold_file)
  merge_fold_checkpoint(fold_result)
  write_outer_progress()

  log_progress("outer_fold_done", paste("fold", i, "of", length(outer_folds), "| held-out author =", held_out_author))
}

oof_metrics <- bind_rows(
  summarize_model_oof(oof$manual_label, oof$nb_oof, oof$nb_pred_youden_oof, oof$nb_pred_f1_oof, "naive_bayes"),
  summarize_model_oof(oof$manual_label, oof$prob_enet, oof$label_enet_youden, oof$label_enet_f1, "enet"),
  summarize_model_oof(oof$manual_label, oof$svm_oof, oof$svm_pred_youden_oof, oof$svm_pred_f1_oof, "svm_platt"),
  summarize_model_oof(oof$manual_label, oof$xgb_oof, oof$xgb_pred_youden_oof, oof$xgb_pred_f1_oof, "xgboost"),
  summarize_model_oof(oof$manual_label, oof$lgb_oof, oof$lgb_pred_youden_oof, oof$lgb_pred_f1_oof, "lightgbm")
)

write_csv_atomic(oof_metrics, file.path(output_dir, "oof_model_metrics.csv"))

full_vec <- fit_vectorizer(lab$text, latin_stops, min_df = 3L)
x_lab_dfm_full <- transform_counts_dfm(lab$text, full_vec, latin_stops)
x_all_dfm_full <- transform_counts_dfm(out$text, full_vec, latin_stops)
x_lab_full <- transform_tfidf_sparse(lab$text, full_vec, latin_stops)
x_all_full <- transform_tfidf_sparse(out$text, full_vec, latin_stops)

full_inner_plans <- build_inner_fold_plan(
  text = lab$text,
  y = lab$manual_label,
  groups = lab$author_cv,
  stop_list = latin_stops,
  k = 5L,
  seed = 9100,
  min_df = 3L
)

if (length(full_inner_plans) == 0) {
  stop("No valid author-blocked inner folds for full-data refit.")
}

full_base <- tibble(
  row_id = out$row_id,
  id = out$id,
  author_original = out$author_original,
  author_cv = out$author_cv,
  manual_label = out$manual_label
)

full_state_file <- file.path(full_checkpoint_dir, "full_refit_state.rds")
full_state <- read_rds_or_null(full_state_file)

if (is.list(full_state) && is.data.frame(full_state$full_predictions)) {
  full_predictions <- full_state$full_predictions
  full_done <- unique(as.character(full_state$done))
  full_selected <- full_state$selected
  if (!is.list(full_selected)) full_selected <- list()
  log_progress("full_refit_resume", paste("completed models =", paste(full_done, collapse = ", ")))
} else {
  full_predictions <- full_base
  full_done <- character()
  full_selected <- list()
}

save_full_state <- function() {
  save_rds_atomic(
    list(
      updated_at = Sys.time(),
      done = unique(full_done),
      full_predictions = full_predictions,
      selected = full_selected
    ),
    full_state_file
  )
  write_csv_atomic(full_predictions, file.path(output_dir, "full_corpus_model_scores.csv"))
}

save_rds_atomic(
  list(
    created_at = Sys.time(),
    hyperparameter_source = hp_path,
    vectorizer = full_vec,
    enet_candidates = enet_candidates_all,
    svm_candidates = svm_candidates_all,
    xgb_candidates = xgb_candidates_all,
    lgb_candidates = lgb_candidates_all
  ),
  file.path(full_checkpoint_dir, "full_refit_common.rds")
)

if ("naive_bayes" %in% full_done && all(c("nb_score", "nb_prob") %in% names(full_predictions))) {
  log_progress("full_refit_skip", "naive_bayes")
} else {
  log_progress("full_refit_start", "naive_bayes")
  nb_full_train_scores <- cv_scores_nb(full_inner_plans)
  nb_full_platt <- fit_platt(nb_full_train_scores, lab$manual_label)
  nb_full_fit <- fit_nb_model(x_lab_dfm_full, lab$manual_label)
  nb_all_scores <- predict_nb_score(nb_full_fit, x_all_dfm_full)
  full_predictions <- full_predictions %>%
    mutate(
      nb_score = nb_all_scores,
      nb_prob = apply_platt(nb_full_platt, nb_all_scores)
    )
  save_rds_atomic(
    list(model = "naive_bayes", fit = nb_full_fit, platt = nb_full_platt, vectorizer = full_vec),
    file.path(full_checkpoint_dir, "full_naive_bayes_fit.rds")
  )
  full_done <- union(full_done, "naive_bayes")
  save_full_state()
}

if ("enet" %in% full_done && all(c("score_enet_logit", "prob_enet") %in% names(full_predictions))) {
  log_progress("full_refit_skip", "enet")
} else {
  log_progress("full_refit_start", "enet")
  enet_full_eval <- evaluate_enet_candidates(full_inner_plans, lab$manual_label, enet_candidates_all)
  enet_full_best <- enet_full_eval[1, , drop = FALSE]
  enet_full_train_scores <- cv_scores_enet(full_inner_plans, alpha = enet_full_best$alpha[1], lambda = enet_full_best$lambda[1])
  enet_full_platt <- fit_platt(enet_full_train_scores, lab$manual_label)
  enet_full_fit <- fit_enet_fixed(x_lab_full, lab$manual_label, alpha = enet_full_best$alpha[1], lambda = enet_full_best$lambda[1])
  enet_all_scores <- predict_enet_score(enet_full_fit, x_all_full)
  full_predictions <- full_predictions %>%
    mutate(
      score_enet_logit = enet_all_scores,
      prob_enet = apply_platt(enet_full_platt, enet_all_scores)
    )
  full_selected$enet <- enet_full_best
  save_rds_atomic(
    list(model = "enet", fit = enet_full_fit, platt = enet_full_platt, selected = enet_full_best, vectorizer = full_vec),
    file.path(full_checkpoint_dir, "full_enet_fit.rds")
  )
  full_done <- union(full_done, "enet")
  save_full_state()
}

if ("svm_platt" %in% full_done && all(c("svm_score", "svm_prob") %in% names(full_predictions))) {
  log_progress("full_refit_skip", "svm_platt")
} else {
  log_progress("full_refit_start", "svm_platt")
  svm_full_eval <- evaluate_svm_candidates(full_inner_plans, lab$manual_label, svm_candidates_all)
  svm_full_best <- svm_full_eval[1, , drop = FALSE]
  svm_full_train_res <- cv_scores_svm(full_inner_plans, cost = svm_full_best$cost[1])
  svm_full_platt <- fit_platt(svm_full_train_res$scores, lab$manual_label)
  svm_full_fit <- fit_svm_fixed(x_lab_full, lab$manual_label, cost = svm_full_best$cost[1])
  svm_all_scores <- svm_full_best$sign[1] * predict_svm_score_raw(svm_full_fit, x_all_full)
  full_predictions <- full_predictions %>%
    mutate(
      svm_score = svm_all_scores,
      svm_prob = apply_platt(svm_full_platt, svm_all_scores)
    )
  full_selected$svm_platt <- svm_full_best
  save_rds_atomic(
    list(model = "svm_platt", fit = svm_full_fit, platt = svm_full_platt, selected = svm_full_best, vectorizer = full_vec),
    file.path(full_checkpoint_dir, "full_svm_platt_fit.rds")
  )
  full_done <- union(full_done, "svm_platt")
  save_full_state()
}

if ("xgboost" %in% full_done && all(c("xgb_score", "xgb_prob") %in% names(full_predictions))) {
  log_progress("full_refit_skip", "xgboost")
} else {
  log_progress("full_refit_start", "xgboost")
  xgb_full_eval <- evaluate_xgb_candidates(full_inner_plans, lab$manual_label, xgb_candidates_all, seed = 9200)
  xgb_full_best <- xgb_full_eval[1, , drop = FALSE]
  xgb_full_train_scores <- cv_scores_xgb(full_inner_plans, cand = xgb_full_best, seed = 9300)
  xgb_full_platt <- fit_platt(xgb_full_train_scores, lab$manual_label)
  xgb_n_pos <- sum(lab$manual_label == "christian")
  xgb_n_neg <- sum(lab$manual_label == "non_christian")
  xgb_full_params <- make_xgb_params(xgb_full_best, scale_pos_weight = xgb_n_neg / max(xgb_n_pos, 1), seed = 9400)
  xgb_full_fit <- fit_xgb_fixed(x_lab_full, lab$manual_label, params = xgb_full_params, nrounds = xgb_full_best$best_nrounds[1], seed = 9400)
  xgb_all_scores <- predict_xgb_score(xgb_full_fit, x_all_full)
  full_predictions <- full_predictions %>%
    mutate(
      xgb_score = xgb_all_scores,
      xgb_prob = apply_platt(xgb_full_platt, xgb_all_scores)
    )
  full_selected$xgboost <- xgb_full_best
  save_rds_atomic(
    list(model = "xgboost", fit = xgb_full_fit, platt = xgb_full_platt, selected = xgb_full_best, params = xgb_full_params, vectorizer = full_vec),
    file.path(full_checkpoint_dir, "full_xgboost_fit.rds")
  )
  full_done <- union(full_done, "xgboost")
  save_full_state()
}

if ("lightgbm" %in% full_done && all(c("lgb_score", "lgb_prob") %in% names(full_predictions))) {
  log_progress("full_refit_skip", "lightgbm")
} else {
  log_progress("full_refit_start", "lightgbm")
  lgb_full_eval <- evaluate_lgb_candidates(full_inner_plans, lab$manual_label, lgb_candidates_all, seed = 9500)
  lgb_full_best <- lgb_full_eval[1, , drop = FALSE]
  lgb_full_train_scores <- cv_scores_lgb(full_inner_plans, cand = lgb_full_best, seed = 9600)
  lgb_full_platt <- fit_platt(lgb_full_train_scores, lab$manual_label)
  lgb_full_params <- make_lgb_params(lgb_full_best, seed = 9700)
  lgb_full_fit <- fit_lgb_fixed(x_lab_full, lab$manual_label, params = lgb_full_params, nrounds = lgb_full_best$best_nrounds[1])
  lgb_all_scores <- predict_lgb_score(lgb_full_fit, x_all_full, num_iteration = lgb_full_best$best_nrounds[1])
  full_predictions <- full_predictions %>%
    mutate(
      lgb_score = lgb_all_scores,
      lgb_prob = apply_platt(lgb_full_platt, lgb_all_scores)
    )
  full_selected$lightgbm <- lgb_full_best
  save_rds_atomic(
    list(model = "lightgbm", fit = lgb_full_fit, platt = lgb_full_platt, selected = lgb_full_best, params = lgb_full_params, vectorizer = full_vec),
    file.path(full_checkpoint_dir, "full_lightgbm_fit.rds")
  )
  full_done <- union(full_done, "lightgbm")
  save_full_state()
}

save_full_state()

save_rds_atomic(
  list(
    completed_at = Sys.time(),
    hyperparameter_source = hp_path,
    enet_candidates = enet_candidates_all,
    svm_candidates = svm_candidates_all,
    xgb_candidates = xgb_candidates_all,
    lgb_candidates = lgb_candidates_all,
    full_selected = full_selected,
    outer_fold_checkpoints = list.files(fold_checkpoint_dir, pattern = "^outer_fold_.*\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE),
    full_refit_checkpoints = list.files(full_checkpoint_dir, pattern = "\\.rds$", full.names = TRUE)
  ),
  file.path(output_dir, "loao_run_metadata.rds")
)

log_progress("done", "leave-one-author-out run completed")

```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# LOAO author-CV visual diagnostics
# No ensemble, no figure titles/subtitles
# ============================================================

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(pROC)
library(forcats)
library(stringr)

if (!exists("output_dir")) {
  output_dir <- file.path(results_path, "model_outputs_loao_author_cv")
}

loao_plot_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "plots_loao_author_cv")
loao_table_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "tables_loao_author_cv")

dir.create(loao_plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(loao_table_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

read_loao <- function(object_name, file_name) {
  path <- file.path(output_dir, file_name)

  if (file.exists(path)) {
    return(readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE))
  }

  if (exists(object_name, inherits = TRUE)) {
    x <- get(object_name, inherits = TRUE)
    if (is.list(x) && !is.data.frame(x)) return(dplyr::bind_rows(x))
    return(tibble::as_tibble(x))
  }

  stop("Could not find ", file_name, " or object `", object_name, "`.")
}

clip_prob <- function(p, eps = 1e-15) {
  pmin(pmax(as.numeric(p), eps), 1 - eps)
}

log_loss_vec <- function(y, p) {
  p <- clip_prob(p)
  y01 <- as.integer(y == "christian")
  -mean(y01 * log(p) + (1 - y01) * log(1 - p), na.rm = TRUE)
}

brier_vec <- function(y, p) {
  p <- clip_prob(p)
  y01 <- as.integer(y == "christian")
  mean((y01 - p)^2, na.rm = TRUE)
}

auc_vec <- function(y, p) {
  y <- droplevels(factor(y, levels = c("non_christian", "christian")))
  if (length(unique(na.omit(y))) < 2) return(NA_real_)

  tryCatch(
    as.numeric(pROC::auc(pROC::roc(
      response = y,
      predictor = clip_prob(p),
      levels = c("non_christian", "christian"),
      direction = "<",
      quiet = TRUE
    ))),
    error = function(e) NA_real_
  )
}

ap_vec <- function(y, p) {
  y01 <- as.integer(y == "christian")
  p <- clip_prob(p)
  keep <- is.finite(p) & !is.na(y01)

  y01 <- y01[keep]
  p <- p[keep]

  n_pos <- sum(y01 == 1)
  if (n_pos == 0) return(NA_real_)

  ord <- order(p, decreasing = TRUE)
  y01 <- y01[ord]

  precision <- cumsum(y01 == 1) / seq_along(y01)
  sum(precision[y01 == 1]) / n_pos
}

ece_vec <- function(y, p, bins = 10L) {
  tibble(
    y01 = as.integer(y == "christian"),
    p = clip_prob(p)
  ) %>%
    filter(is.finite(p), !is.na(y01)) %>%
    mutate(bin = ntile(p, bins)) %>%
    group_by(bin) %>%
    summarise(
      n_bin = dplyr::n(),
      pred = mean(p),
      obs = mean(y01),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    summarise(
      ece = weighted.mean(abs(obs - pred), n_bin),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    pull(ece)
}

calib_coef <- function(y, p) {
  y01 <- as.integer(y == "christian")
  z <- qlogis(clip_prob(p))

  keep <- is.finite(z) & !is.na(y01)
  y01 <- y01[keep]
  z <- z[keep]

  if (length(unique(y01)) < 2 || length(unique(z)) < 2) {
    return(c(intercept = NA_real_, slope = NA_real_))
  }

  fit <- tryCatch(
    suppressWarnings(glm(y01 ~ z, family = binomial())),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(fit)) return(c(intercept = NA_real_, slope = NA_real_))

  cf <- coef(fit)
  c(intercept = unname(cf[1]), slope = unname(cf[2]))
}

weighted_mean_safe <- function(x, w) {
  x <- as.numeric(x)
  w <- as.numeric(w)

  keep <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(w) & w > 0
  if (!any(keep)) return(NA_real_)

  sum(x[keep] * w[keep]) / sum(w[keep])
}

row_sd_safe <- function(m) {
  apply(m, 1, function(z) {
    z <- z[is.finite(z)]
    if (length(z) < 2) return(NA_real_)
    sd(z)
  })
}

theme_loao <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_blank(),
      plot.subtitle = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#111827"),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "#111827"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#111827"),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F3F4F6", color = NA),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      panel.spacing = unit(1.1, "lines"),
      plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8)
    )
}

save_plot <- function(p, name, width = 10, height = 7) {
  ggsave(
    file.path(loao_plot_dir, paste0(name, ".pdf")),
    p,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    bg = "white"
  )

  ggsave(
    file.path(loao_plot_dir, paste0(name, ".png")),
    p,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    dpi = 600,
    bg = "white"
  )

  if (requireNamespace("svglite", quietly = TRUE)) {
    ggsave(
      file.path(loao_plot_dir, paste0(name, ".svg")),
      p,
      width = width,
      height = height,
      device = svglite::svglite,
      bg = "white"
    )
  }

  invisible(p)
}

# ============================================================
# Load LOAO outputs
# ============================================================

oof_vis <- read_loao("oof", "oof_predictions_labeled.csv")
fold_vis <- read_loao("outer_fold_metrics", "outer_fold_metrics.csv")

model_name_map <- c(
  naive_bayes = "Naive Bayes",
  enet = "Elastic net",
  svm_platt = "SVM + Platt",
  xgboost = "XGBoost",
  lightgbm = "LightGBM"
)

prob_map <- c(
  "Naive Bayes" = "nb_oof",
  "Elastic net" = "prob_enet",
  "SVM + Platt" = "svm_oof",
  "XGBoost" = "xgb_oof",
  "LightGBM" = "lgb_oof"
)

prob_map <- prob_map[prob_map %in% names(oof_vis)]
base_prob_cols <- unname(prob_map)

if (length(base_prob_cols) == 0) {
  stop("No LOAO probability columns found.")
}

prob_label_map <- setNames(names(prob_map), unname(prob_map))

oof_probs <- oof_vis %>%
  mutate(
    manual_label = factor(manual_label, levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
    across(all_of(base_prob_cols), clip_prob)
  )

prob_matrix <- as.matrix(oof_probs[, base_prob_cols, drop = FALSE])

oof_probs <- oof_probs %>%
  mutate(model_sd = row_sd_safe(prob_matrix))

oof_long <- oof_probs %>%
  select(
    row_id,
    id,
    author_original,
    author_cv,
    manual_label,
    model_sd,
    all_of(base_prob_cols)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(base_prob_cols),
    names_to = "prob_col",
    values_to = "prob"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    model_label = unname(prob_label_map[prob_col]),
    model_label = factor(model_label)
  )

# ============================================================
# Overall OOF diagnostics
# ============================================================

overall_stats <- oof_long %>%
  group_by(model_label) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    y <- .x$manual_label
    p <- clip_prob(.x$prob)
    cc <- calib_coef(y, p)

    mean_ch <- mean(p[y == "christian"], na.rm = TRUE)
    mean_non <- mean(p[y == "non_christian"], na.rm = TRUE)

    tibble(
      n_docs = nrow(.x),
      auc = auc_vec(y, p),
      average_precision = ap_vec(y, p),
      log_loss = log_loss_vec(y, p),
      brier = brier_vec(y, p),
      ece = ece_vec(y, p),
      calibration_intercept = unname(cc[["intercept"]]),
      calibration_slope = unname(cc[["slope"]]),
      mean_prob_christian = mean_ch,
      mean_prob_non_christian = mean_non,
      separation = mean_ch - mean_non
    )
  }) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(desc(auc), log_loss)

readr::write_csv(
  overall_stats,
  file.path(loao_table_dir, "loao_overall_model_diagnostics.csv")
)

model_order <- as.character(overall_stats$model_label)

model_pal <- c(
  "Naive Bayes" = "#5B5F97",
  "Elastic net" = "#0E7C7B",
  "SVM + Platt" = "#D95D39",
  "XGBoost" = "#7B2CBF",
  "LightGBM" = "#2F9E44"
)

label_pal <- c(
  non_christian = "#2563EB",
  christian = "#B91C1C"
)

oof_long <- oof_long %>%
  mutate(model_label = factor(model_label, levels = model_order))

overall_long <- overall_stats %>%
  mutate(model_label = factor(model_label, levels = model_order)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      auc,
      average_precision,
      log_loss,
      brier,
      ece,
      calibration_slope,
      separation
    ),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    metric_label = recode(
      metric,
      auc = "AUC",
      average_precision = "Average precision",
      log_loss = "Log loss",
      brier = "Brier score",
      ece = "Expected calibration error",
      calibration_slope = "Calibration slope",
      separation = "Mean probability separation"
    )
  )

p_overall_stats <- ggplot(
  overall_long,
  aes(x = model_label, y = value, fill = model_label)
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.68, alpha = 0.90) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = number(value, accuracy = 0.001)),
    hjust = -0.08,
    size = 3.0,
    color = "#111827"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~metric_label, scales = "free_x", ncol = 2) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = model_pal, guide = "none") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_loao()

save_plot(p_overall_stats, "loao_overall_model_diagnostics", 10.5, 9)
print(p_overall_stats)

# ============================================================
# Fold-level metric distributions
# ============================================================

fold_vis <- fold_vis %>%
  distinct(outer_fold, held_out_author, model, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    model_label = unname(model_name_map[model]),
    model_label = if_else(
      is.na(model_label),
      str_to_title(str_replace_all(model, "_", " ")),
      model_label
    ),
    model_label = factor(model_label, levels = model_order)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(model_label))

metric_map <- c(
  auc = "AUC",
  log_loss = "Log loss",
  brier = "Brier score",
  balanced_accuracy_youden = "Balanced accuracy",
  f1_youden = "F1",
  mcc_youden = "MCC"
)

metric_cols <- intersect(names(metric_map), names(fold_vis))

fold_long <- fold_vis %>%
  select(outer_fold, held_out_author, model_label, n, all_of(metric_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(metric_cols),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    metric_label = factor(metric_map[metric], levels = unname(metric_map[metric_cols])),
    value = as.numeric(value)
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(value), !is.na(model_label))

fold_metric_summary <- fold_long %>%
  group_by(model_label, metric_label) %>%
  summarise(
    n_folds = dplyr::n(),
    mean = mean(value),
    median = median(value),
    q10 = quantile(value, 0.10),
    q25 = quantile(value, 0.25),
    q75 = quantile(value, 0.75),
    q90 = quantile(value, 0.90),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

readr::write_csv(
  fold_metric_summary,
  file.path(loao_table_dir, "loao_fold_metric_distribution_summary.csv")
)

p_fold_metrics <- ggplot(
  fold_long,
  aes(x = model_label, y = value, fill = model_label, color = model_label)
) +
  geom_violin(
    width = 0.90,
    alpha = 0.13,
    linewidth = 0.35,
    trim = FALSE,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.18,
    alpha = 0.68,
    linewidth = 0.35,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(size = pmax(n, 1)),
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.10, height = 0),
    alpha = 0.25,
    stroke = 0,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~metric_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = model_pal, guide = "none") +
  scale_color_manual(values = model_pal, guide = "none") +
  scale_size_area(max_size = 2.8, name = "Held-out documents") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_loao()

save_plot(p_fold_metrics, "loao_fold_metric_distributions", 11, 7.5)
print(p_fold_metrics)

# ============================================================
# OOF probability distributions by manual label
# ============================================================

# ============================================================
# OOF probability distributions by manual label
# ============================================================

p_prob_density <- ggplot(
  oof_long,
  aes(x = prob, fill = manual_label, color = manual_label)
) +
  geom_density(
    alpha = 0.28,
    linewidth = 0.65,
    adjust = 1.05,
    na.rm = TRUE
  ) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = 0.5,
    linewidth = 0.35,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "grey35"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~model_label, ncol = 2) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0, 1)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = label_pal, name = "Manual label") +
  scale_color_manual(values = label_pal, name = "Manual label") +
  labs(
    x = "Out-of-author predicted probability of Christian label",
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  theme_loao()

save_plot(p_prob_density, "loao_oof_probability_distributions", 11, 8)
print(p_prob_density)

if (requireNamespace("ggridges", quietly = TRUE)) {
  p_prob_ridges <- ggplot(
    oof_long,
    aes(x = prob, y = model_label, fill = manual_label, color = manual_label)
  ) +
    ggridges::geom_density_ridges(
      alpha = 0.22,
      scale = 1.15,
      rel_min_height = 0.01,
      linewidth = 0.45
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1),
      limits = c(0, 1)
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = label_pal, name = "Manual label") +
    scale_color_manual(values = label_pal, name = "Manual label") +
    labs(
      x = "Out-of-author predicted probability of Christian label",
      y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_loao()

  save_plot(p_prob_ridges, "loao_oof_probability_ridges", 10.5, 5.8)
  print(p_prob_ridges)
}

# ============================================================
# Calibration curves
# ============================================================

calib_bins <- oof_long %>%
  group_by(model_label) %>%
  mutate(bin = ntile(prob, 10)) %>%
  group_by(model_label, bin) %>%
  summarise(
    n_bin = dplyr::n(),
    mean_pred = mean(prob, na.rm = TRUE),
    obs = mean(manual_label == "christian", na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sqrt(obs * (1 - obs) / n_bin),
    ymin = pmax(0, obs - 1.96 * se),
    ymax = pmin(1, obs + 1.96 * se),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p_calibration <- ggplot(
  calib_bins,
  aes(x = mean_pred, y = obs, color = model_label)
) +
  geom_abline(
    slope = 1,
    intercept = 0,
    linewidth = 0.45,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "grey45"
  ) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
    width = 0.012,
    alpha = 0.65,
    linewidth = 0.45
  ) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n_bin), alpha = 0.85) +
  facet_wrap(~model_label, ncol = 2) +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = model_pal, guide = "none") +
  scale_size_area(max_size = 4.2, name = "Documents per bin") +
  labs(
    x = "Mean predicted probability",
    y = "Observed Christian share"
  ) +
  theme_loao()

save_plot(p_calibration, "loao_calibration_curves", 9.5, 8.5)
print(p_calibration)

# ============================================================
# ROC curves
# ============================================================

roc_df <- oof_long %>%
  group_by(model_label) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    r <- tryCatch(
      pROC::roc(
        response = .x$manual_label,
        predictor = clip_prob(.x$prob),
        levels = c("non_christian", "christian"),
        direction = "<",
        quiet = TRUE
      ),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )

    if (is.null(r)) return(tibble())

    tibble(
      fpr = 1 - as.numeric(r$specificities),
      tpr = as.numeric(r$sensitivities)
    )
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

roc_labels <- overall_stats %>%
  transmute(
    model_label = factor(model_label, levels = model_order),
    x = 0.62,
    y = 0.12,
    lab = paste0("AUC = ", number(auc, accuracy = 0.001))
  )

p_roc <- ggplot(roc_df, aes(x = fpr, y = tpr, color = model_label)) +
  geom_abline(
    slope = 1,
    intercept = 0,
    linewidth = 0.45,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "grey55"
  ) +
  geom_path(linewidth = 0.85, alpha = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_text(
    data = roc_labels,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = lab),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.2,
    color = "#111827"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~model_label, ncol = 2) +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = model_pal, guide = "none") +
  labs(
    x = "False positive rate",
    y = "True positive rate"
  ) +
  theme_loao()

save_plot(p_roc, "loao_oof_roc_curves", 9.5, 8.5)
print(p_roc)

# ============================================================
# Precision-recall curves
# ============================================================

pr_df <- oof_long %>%
  group_by(model_label) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    y01 <- as.integer(.x$manual_label == "christian")
    p <- clip_prob(.x$prob)

    keep <- is.finite(p) & !is.na(y01)
    y01 <- y01[keep]
    p <- p[keep]

    if (sum(y01 == 1) == 0 || sum(y01 == 0) == 0) return(tibble())

    ord <- order(p, decreasing = TRUE)
    y01 <- y01[ord]
    p <- p[ord]

    tp <- cumsum(y01 == 1)
    fp <- cumsum(y01 == 0)

    tibble(
      recall = tp / sum(y01 == 1),
      precision = tp / pmax(tp + fp, 1)
    )
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

pr_labels <- overall_stats %>%
  transmute(
    model_label = factor(model_label, levels = model_order),
    x = 0.52,
    y = 0.12,
    lab = paste0("AP = ", number(average_precision, accuracy = 0.001))
  )

p_pr <- ggplot(pr_df, aes(x = recall, y = precision, color = model_label)) +
  geom_path(linewidth = 0.85, alpha = 0.95, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_text(
    data = pr_labels,
    aes(x = x, y = y, label = lab),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.2,
    color = "#111827"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~model_label, ncol = 2) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = model_pal, guide = "none") +
  labs(
    x = "Recall",
    y = "Precision"
  ) +
  theme_loao()

save_plot(p_pr, "loao_oof_precision_recall_curves", 9.5, 8.5)
print(p_pr)

# ============================================================
# Held-out author difficulty
# ============================================================

author_model <- oof_long %>%
  group_by(author_original, author_cv, model_label) %>%
  summarise(
    n_author_docs = dplyr::n(),
    n_christian = sum(manual_label == "christian", na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_christian = n_christian / n_author_docs,
    log_loss = log_loss_vec(manual_label, prob),
    brier = brier_vec(manual_label, prob),
    mean_abs_error = mean(
      abs(as.integer(manual_label == "christian") - prob),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

author_summary <- author_model %>%
  group_by(author_original, author_cv) %>%
  summarise(
    n_docs = max(n_author_docs, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_christian = weighted_mean_safe(prop_christian, n_author_docs),
    mean_log_loss = weighted_mean_safe(log_loss, n_author_docs),
    min_log_loss = min(log_loss, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_log_loss = max(log_loss, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_brier = weighted_mean_safe(brier, n_author_docs),
    mean_abs_error = weighted_mean_safe(mean_abs_error, n_author_docs),
    model_log_loss_range = max_log_loss - min_log_loss,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(mean_log_loss)) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_log_loss))

readr::write_csv(
  author_model,
  file.path(loao_table_dir, "loao_author_by_model_diagnostics.csv")
)

readr::write_csv(
  author_summary,
  file.path(loao_table_dir, "loao_author_difficulty_summary.csv")
)

top_author_n <- min(35L, nrow(author_summary))
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Held-out author difficulty plot, cleaner version
# ============================================================

MIN_AUTHOR_DOCS <- 2L
TOP_AUTHOR_N <- 30L

author_summary_plot <- author_summary %>%
  filter(n_docs >= MIN_AUTHOR_DOCS) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_log_loss)) %>%
  slice_head(n = min(TOP_AUTHOR_N, nrow(.))) %>%
  mutate(
    author_label_raw = if_else(
      is.na(author_original) | author_original == "",
      author_cv,
      author_original
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(author_label_raw) %>%
  mutate(
    author_label = if_else(
      dplyr::n() > 1,
      paste0(author_label_raw, " [", author_cv, "]"),
      author_label_raw
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    author_label = forcats::fct_reorder(
      stringr::str_trunc(author_label, 48),
      mean_log_loss
    )
  )

p_author_difficulty <- ggplot(
  author_summary_plot,
  aes(x = author_label, y = mean_log_loss)
) +
  geom_linerange(
    aes(ymin = min_log_loss, ymax = max_log_loss),
    linewidth = 0.8,
    alpha = 0.30,
    color = "#111827"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(size = n_docs, color = prop_christian),
    alpha = 0.92
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_size_area(
    max_size = 5.5,
    name = "Documents"
  ) +
  scale_color_gradient(
    low = "#2563EB",
    high = "#B91C1C",
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    name = "Christian share"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean held-out log loss across models"
  ) +
  theme_loao() +
  theme(
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9)
  )

save_plot(
  p_author_difficulty,
  "loao_hardest_held_out_authors_clean",
  10,
  8.5
)

print(p_author_difficulty)
```


```{r}
# ============================================================
# LOAO author-pattern diagnostics with corpus dates restored
# ============================================================

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(forcats)
library(stringr)

if (!exists("output_dir")) {
  output_dir <- file.path(results_path, "model_outputs_loao_author_cv")
}

loao_plot_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "plots_loao_author_cv")
loao_table_dir <- file.path(output_dir, "tables_loao_author_cv")
dir.create(loao_plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(loao_table_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

clip_prob <- function(p, eps = 1e-15) {
  pmin(pmax(as.numeric(p), eps), 1 - eps)
}

log_loss_vec <- function(y, p) {
  p <- clip_prob(p)
  y01 <- as.integer(y == "christian")
  -mean(y01 * log(p) + (1 - y01) * log(1 - p), na.rm = TRUE)
}

brier_vec <- function(y, p) {
  p <- clip_prob(p)
  y01 <- as.integer(y == "christian")
  mean((y01 - p)^2, na.rm = TRUE)
}

weighted_mean_safe <- function(x, w) {
  x <- as.numeric(x)
  w <- as.numeric(w)
  keep <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(w) & w > 0
  if (!any(keep)) return(NA_real_)
  sum(x[keep] * w[keep]) / sum(w[keep])
}

save_plot <- function(p, name, width = 10, height = 7) {
  ggsave(file.path(loao_plot_dir, paste0(name, ".pdf")), p, width = width, height = height, bg = "white")
  ggsave(file.path(loao_plot_dir, paste0(name, ".png")), p, width = width, height = height, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
  if (requireNamespace("svglite", quietly = TRUE)) {
    ggsave(file.path(loao_plot_dir, paste0(name, ".svg")), p, width = width, height = height, device = svglite::svglite, bg = "white")
  }
  invisible(p)
}

theme_loao <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_blank(),
      plot.subtitle = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#111827"),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "#111827"),
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", color = "#111827"),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F3F4F6", color = NA),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      panel.spacing = unit(1.1, "lines"),
      plot.margin = margin(8, 8, 8, 8)
    )
}

parse_year <- function(x) {
  x0 <- as.character(x)
  x0 <- str_trim(x0)
  x0[x0 == ""] <- NA_character_

  has_bc <- str_detect(str_to_lower(x0), "\\b(bc|bce)\\b")
  has_ad <- str_detect(str_to_lower(x0), "\\b(ad|ce)\\b")
```
