```{r}
  num <- str_extract(x0, "-?\\d+(\\.\\d+)?")
  out <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(num))

  out <- ifelse(has_bc & !str_detect(num, "^-"), -abs(out), out)
  out <- ifelse(has_ad, abs(out), out)
  out
}

detect_exact_or_regex <- function(dat, exact = character(), regex = NULL) {
  nms <- names(dat)
  low <- tolower(nms)

  exact_low <- tolower(exact)
  hit <- nms[match(exact_low, low, nomatch = 0)]
  hit <- hit[hit != ""]
  if (length(hit) > 0) return(hit[1])

  if (!is.null(regex)) {
    rx_hit <- nms[str_detect(low, regex)]
    if (length(rx_hit) > 0) return(rx_hit[1])
  }

  NA_character_
}

detect_all_dateish_cols <- function(dat) {
  nms <- names(dat)
  low <- tolower(nms)
  nms[str_detect(low, "date|year|centur|chron|period|time|sdate|edate|start|end|termin")]
}

make_author_cv_id_local <- function(x) {
  x <- str_trim(as.character(x))
  x[x == "" | is.na(x)] <- NA_character_
  y <- stringi::stri_trans_general(x, "Any-Latin; Latin-ASCII")
  y <- tolower(y)
  y <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "_", y)
  y <- gsub("^_+|_+$", "", y)
  y
}

detect_author_column_local <- function(dat) {
  preferred <- c(
    "author", "author_clean", "author_name", "author_short",
    "source_author", "creator", "source_creator",
    "author_normalized", "canonical_author"
  )
  hit <- preferred[preferred %in% names(dat)]
  if (length(hit) > 0) return(hit[1])

  rx <- names(dat)[str_detect(names(dat), regex("author|creator", ignore_case = TRUE))]
  if (length(rx) > 0) return(rx[1])

  NA_character_
}

make_doc_date_fields <- function(meta) {
  start_col <- detect_exact_or_regex(
    meta,
    exact = c(
      "sdate", "start_date", "date_start", "date_min", "min_date",
      "start_year", "year_start", "min_year", "terminus_post_quem",
      "not_before", "earliest_date", "earliest_year", "from"
    ),
    regex = "^(sdate|start_?date|date_?start|date_?min|min_?date|start_?year|year_?start|min_?year|not_?before|earliest_?(date|year)|terminus_?post|from)$"
  )

  end_col <- detect_exact_or_regex(
    meta,
    exact = c(
      "edate", "end_date", "date_end", "date_max", "max_date",
      "end_year", "year_end", "max_year", "terminus_ante_quem",
      "not_after", "latest_date", "latest_year", "to"
    ),
    regex = "^(edate|end_?date|date_?end|date_?max|max_?date|end_?year|year_?end|max_?year|not_?after|latest_?(date|year)|terminus_?ante|to)$"
  )

  mid_col <- detect_exact_or_regex(
    meta,
    exact = c(
      "date", "year", "mid_date", "mean_date", "median_date",
      "date_mid", "mid_year", "mean_year", "median_year",
      "sdate_mid", "date_mean"
    ),
    regex = "^(date|year|mid_?date|mean_?date|median_?date|date_?mid|mid_?year|mean_?year|median_?year|date_?mean)$"
  )

  out <- meta

  if (!is.na(start_col) && !is.na(end_col)) {
    s <- parse_year(out[[start_col]])
    e <- parse_year(out[[end_col]])
    out$doc_date_start <- s
    out$doc_date_end <- e
    out$doc_date_mid <- rowMeans(cbind(s, e), na.rm = TRUE)
    out$doc_date_source <- paste(start_col, end_col, sep = " + ")
  } else if (!is.na(mid_col)) {
    m <- parse_year(out[[mid_col]])
    out$doc_date_start <- m
    out$doc_date_end <- m
    out$doc_date_mid <- m
    out$doc_date_source <- mid_col
  } else {
    out$doc_date_start <- NA_real_
    out$doc_date_end <- NA_real_
    out$doc_date_mid <- NA_real_
    out$doc_date_source <- NA_character_
  }

  out$doc_date_mid[is.nan(out$doc_date_mid)] <- NA_real_

  attr(out, "start_col") <- start_col
  attr(out, "end_col") <- end_col
  attr(out, "mid_col") <- mid_col
  attr(out, "dateish_cols") <- detect_all_dateish_cols(meta)

  out
}

read_loao <- function(object_name, file_name) {
  path <- file.path(output_dir, file_name)
  if (file.exists(path)) return(readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE))

  if (exists(object_name, inherits = TRUE)) {
    x <- get(object_name, inherits = TRUE)
    if (is.list(x) && !is.data.frame(x)) return(dplyr::bind_rows(x))
    return(tibble::as_tibble(x))
  }

  stop("Could not find ", file_name, " or object `", object_name, "`.")
}

# ============================================================
# Load LOAO outputs and corpus metadata
# ============================================================

oof_vis <- read_loao("oof", "oof_predictions_labeled.csv")

corpus_meta <- if (exists("df", inherits = TRUE)) {
  get("df", inherits = TRUE) %>% tibble::as_tibble()
} else {
  readr::read_csv(file.path(data_path, "corpus_600ad.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(id = as.character(id)) %>%
    filter(!("text" %in% names(.)) | (!is.na(text) & text != "")) %>%
    mutate(row_id = row_number())
}

corpus_meta <- corpus_meta %>%
  mutate(id = as.character(id)) %>%
  { if (!"row_id" %in% names(.)) mutate(., row_id = row_number()) else . }

author_col <- detect_author_column_local(corpus_meta)

if (!is.na(author_col)) {
  corpus_meta <- corpus_meta %>%
    mutate(
      corpus_author_original = str_trim(as.character(.data[[author_col]])),
      corpus_author_cv = make_author_cv_id_local(.data[[author_col]])
    )
} else {
  corpus_meta <- corpus_meta %>%
    mutate(
      corpus_author_original = NA_character_,
      corpus_author_cv = NA_character_
    )
}

corpus_meta <- make_doc_date_fields(corpus_meta)

start_col <- attr(corpus_meta, "start_col")
end_col <- attr(corpus_meta, "end_col")
mid_col <- attr(corpus_meta, "mid_col")
dateish_cols <- attr(corpus_meta, "dateish_cols")

message("Detected date start column: ", ifelse(is.na(start_col), "none", start_col))
message("Detected date end column: ", ifelse(is.na(end_col), "none", end_col))
message("Detected single/mid date column: ", ifelse(is.na(mid_col), "none", mid_col))
message("All date-like columns found in corpus: ", paste(dateish_cols, collapse = ", "))

type_col <- detect_exact_or_regex(
  corpus_meta,
  exact = c("type", "genre", "text_type", "form", "prose_poetry", "meter", "mode"),
  regex = "^(type|genre|text_?type|form|prose_?poetry|meter|mode)$"
)

message("Detected type/genre column: ", ifelse(is.na(type_col), "none", type_col))

corpus_join <- corpus_meta %>%
  select(
    row_id,
    id,
    corpus_author_original,
    corpus_author_cv,
    doc_date_start,
    doc_date_end,
    doc_date_mid,
    doc_date_source,
    any_of(type_col)
  ) %>%
  distinct(row_id, .keep_all = TRUE)

join_key <- if ("row_id" %in% names(oof_vis) && "row_id" %in% names(corpus_join)) {
  "row_id"
} else {
  "id"
}

oof_with_meta <- oof_vis %>%
  mutate(id = as.character(id)) %>%
  left_join(corpus_join, by = join_key, suffix = c("", "_corpus")) %>%
  mutate(
    author_original = coalesce(
      na_if(as.character(author_original), ""),
      na_if(corpus_author_original, ""),
      as.character(author_cv),
      corpus_author_cv
    ),
    author_cv = coalesce(
      na_if(as.character(author_cv), ""),
      corpus_author_cv,
      make_author_cv_id_local(author_original)
    )
  )

if (all(is.na(oof_with_meta$doc_date_mid))) {
  warning(
    paste0(
      "No usable dates were recovered. Check these corpus columns manually: ",
      paste(dateish_cols, collapse = ", ")
    )
  )
}

# ============================================================
# Rebuild long OOF probability data, no ensemble
# ============================================================

prob_map <- c(
  "Naive Bayes" = "nb_oof",
  "Elastic net" = "prob_enet",
  "SVM + Platt" = "svm_oof",
  "XGBoost" = "xgb_oof",
  "LightGBM" = "lgb_oof"
)

prob_map <- prob_map[prob_map %in% names(oof_with_meta)]
base_prob_cols <- unname(prob_map)

if (length(base_prob_cols) == 0) {
  stop("No LOAO probability columns found.")
}

prob_label_map <- setNames(names(prob_map), unname(prob_map))

oof_long_meta <- oof_with_meta %>%
  mutate(
    manual_label = factor(manual_label, levels = c("non_christian", "christian")),
    across(all_of(base_prob_cols), clip_prob),
    dominant_type_doc = if (!is.na(type_col)) as.character(.data[[type_col]]) else NA_character_
  ) %>%
  select(
    row_id,
    id,
    author_original,
    author_cv,
    manual_label,
    doc_date_start,
    doc_date_end,
    doc_date_mid,
    doc_date_source,
    dominant_type_doc,
    all_of(base_prob_cols)
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(base_prob_cols),
    names_to = "prob_col",
    values_to = "prob"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    model_label = unname(prob_label_map[prob_col]),
    model_label = factor(model_label, levels = names(prob_map))
  )

# ============================================================
# Author-level LOAO difficulty
# ============================================================

author_model <- oof_long_meta %>%
  group_by(author_original, author_cv, model_label) %>%
  summarise(
    n_author_docs = dplyr::n_distinct(id),
    n_christian = sum(manual_label == "christian", na.rm = TRUE),
    observed_christian_share = mean(manual_label == "christian", na.rm = TRUE),
    log_loss = log_loss_vec(manual_label, prob),
    brier = brier_vec(manual_label, prob),
    mean_abs_error = mean(abs(as.integer(manual_label == "christian") - prob), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

author_summary <- author_model %>%
  group_by(author_original, author_cv) %>%
  summarise(
    n_docs = max(n_author_docs, na.rm = TRUE),
    observed_christian_share = weighted_mean_safe(observed_christian_share, n_author_docs),
    mean_log_loss = weighted_mean_safe(log_loss, n_author_docs),
    min_log_loss = min(log_loss, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_log_loss = max(log_loss, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_brier = weighted_mean_safe(brier, n_author_docs),
    mean_abs_error = weighted_mean_safe(mean_abs_error, n_author_docs),
    model_log_loss_range = max_log_loss - min_log_loss,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(mean_log_loss)) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_log_loss))

# ============================================================
# Author metadata with restored dates
# ============================================================

author_meta <- oof_with_meta %>%
  group_by(author_original, author_cv) %>%
  summarise(
    n_docs_meta = dplyr::n_distinct(id),
    observed_christian_share_meta = mean(manual_label == "christian", na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_date = mean(doc_date_mid, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_date = suppressWarnings(min(doc_date_start, na.rm = TRUE)),
    max_date = suppressWarnings(max(doc_date_end, na.rm = TRUE)),
    date_source = paste(unique(na.omit(doc_date_source)), collapse = "; "),
    dominant_type = {
      z <- dominant_type_doc <- if (!is.na(type_col)) as.character(.data[[type_col]]) else NA_character_
      z <- z[!is.na(z) & z != ""]
      if (length(z) == 0) NA_character_ else names(sort(table(z), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_date = ifelse(is.nan(mean_date), NA_real_, mean_date),
    min_date = ifelse(is.infinite(min_date), NA_real_, min_date),
    max_date = ifelse(is.infinite(max_date), NA_real_, max_date)
  )

author_pattern_df <- author_meta %>%
  left_join(author_summary, by = c("author_original", "author_cv")) %>%
  mutate(
    observed_christian_share = coalesce(observed_christian_share, observed_christian_share_meta),
    label_entropy = case_when(
      is.na(observed_christian_share) ~ NA_real_,
      observed_christian_share %in% c(0, 1) ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ -(
        observed_christian_share * log(observed_christian_share) +
          (1 - observed_christian_share) * log(1 - observed_christian_share)
      )
    ),
    date_bin = case_when(
      is.na(mean_date) ~ "unknown",
      mean_date < -80 ~ "Archaic / Republican",
      mean_date < 14 ~ "Classical",
      mean_date < 180 ~ "Early Imperial",
      mean_date < 300 ~ "Later Imperial",
      mean_date < 500 ~ "Late antique 300–499",
      TRUE ~ "Late antique 500+"
    ),
    christian_share_bin = case_when(
      is.na(observed_christian_share) ~ "unknown",
      observed_christian_share == 0 ~ "0% Christian",
      observed_christian_share == 1 ~ "100% Christian",
      observed_christian_share < 0.5 ~ "mixed, mostly non-Christian",
      observed_christian_share > 0.5 ~ "mixed, mostly Christian",
      TRUE ~ "balanced"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(mean_log_loss)) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_log_loss))

readr::write_csv(
  author_model,
  file.path(loao_table_dir, "loao_author_by_model_diagnostics_with_dates.csv")
)

readr::write_csv(
  author_summary,
  file.path(loao_table_dir, "loao_author_difficulty_summary_with_dates.csv")
)

readr::write_csv(
  author_pattern_df,
  file.path(loao_table_dir, "loao_author_pattern_diagnostics_with_dates.csv")
)

# ============================================================
# Pattern summaries
# ============================================================

pattern_summary_date <- author_pattern_df %>%
  group_by(date_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    n_authors = dplyr::n(),
    median_loss = median(mean_log_loss, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_loss = mean(mean_log_loss, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75_loss = quantile(mean_log_loss, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_christian_share = mean(observed_christian_share, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(median_loss))

pattern_summary_type <- author_pattern_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(dominant_type), dominant_type != "") %>%
  group_by(dominant_type) %>%
  summarise(
    n_authors = dplyr::n(),
    median_loss = median(mean_log_loss, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_loss = mean(mean_log_loss, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75_loss = quantile(mean_log_loss, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_christian_share = mean(observed_christian_share, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(median_loss))

pattern_summary_label <- author_pattern_df %>%
  group_by(christian_share_bin) %>%
  summarise(
    n_authors = dplyr::n(),
    median_loss = median(mean_log_loss, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_loss = mean(mean_log_loss, na.rm = TRUE),
    q75_loss = quantile(mean_log_loss, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(median_loss))

readr::write_csv(pattern_summary_date, file.path(loao_table_dir, "loao_pattern_by_date_bin.csv"))
readr::write_csv(pattern_summary_type, file.path(loao_table_dir, "loao_pattern_by_type.csv"))
readr::write_csv(pattern_summary_label, file.path(loao_table_dir, "loao_pattern_by_label_mix.csv"))

print(pattern_summary_date)
print(pattern_summary_type)
print(pattern_summary_label)

author_pattern_df %>%
  select(
    author_original,
    n_docs,
    observed_christian_share,
    mean_date,
    min_date,
    max_date,
    date_bin,
    dominant_type,
    mean_log_loss,
    model_log_loss_range
  ) %>%
  slice_head(n = 50) %>%
  knitr::kable(digits = 3)

# ============================================================
# Plot: author difficulty by restored date bin
# ============================================================

p_author_pattern <- author_pattern_df %>%
  filter(is.finite(mean_log_loss), !is.na(date_bin)) %>%
  mutate(
    date_bin = forcats::fct_reorder(
      date_bin,
      mean_log_loss,
      .fun = median,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date_bin, y = mean_log_loss)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    width = 0.55,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    linewidth = 0.35,
    alpha = 0.35
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(size = n_docs, color = observed_christian_share),
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.12, height = 0),
    alpha = 0.80
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_size_area(max_size = 5.2, name = "Documents") +
  scale_color_gradient(
    low = "#2563EB",
    high = "#B91C1C",
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    name = "Christian share"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean held-out log loss across models"
  ) +
  theme_loao()

save_plot(
  p_author_pattern,
  "loao_author_difficulty_by_date_bin_fixed",
  9.5,
  6.5
)

print(p_author_pattern)

# ============================================================
# Plot: hardest authors with dates shown in labels
# ============================================================

MIN_AUTHOR_DOCS <- 2L
TOP_AUTHOR_N <- 30L

hard_author_plot_df <- author_pattern_df %>%
  filter(n_docs >= MIN_AUTHOR_DOCS) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_log_loss)) %>%
  slice_head(n = min(TOP_AUTHOR_N, nrow(.))) %>%
  mutate(
    author_label_raw = if_else(
      is.na(author_original) | author_original == "",
      author_cv,
      author_original
    ),
    date_label = if_else(
      is.na(mean_date),
      "unknown",
      as.character(round(mean_date))
    ),
    author_label = paste0(author_label_raw, " (", date_label, ")")
  ) %>%
  group_by(author_label) %>%
  mutate(
    author_label = if_else(
      dplyr::n() > 1,
      paste0(author_label, " [", author_cv, "]"),
      author_label
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    author_label = forcats::fct_reorder(
      stringr::str_trunc(author_label, 56),
      mean_log_loss
    )
  )

p_hard_authors_dates <- ggplot(
  hard_author_plot_df,
  aes(x = author_label, y = mean_log_loss)
) +
  geom_linerange(
    aes(ymin = min_log_loss, ymax = max_log_loss),
    linewidth = 0.8,
    alpha = 0.30,
    color = "#111827"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(size = n_docs, color = observed_christian_share),
    alpha = 0.92
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_size_area(max_size = 5.5, name = "Documents") +
  scale_color_gradient(
    low = "#2563EB",
    high = "#B91C1C",
    labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
    name = "Christian share"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean held-out log loss across models"
  ) +
  theme_loao() +
  theme(
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9)
  )

save_plot(
  p_hard_authors_dates,
  "loao_hardest_held_out_authors_with_dates",
  10.5,
  8.5
)

print(p_hard_authors_dates)
```
